---
title: "EGL002"
author: "Emanuelle Grody"
date: "2025-12-14"
output: html_document
---

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
source("~/SALVEseq/packages.R")
source("~/SALVEseq/functions.R")
```

# Individual Datasets
## GEX

### UMAP coords and cell size

```{r}
samples <- data.frame(
  datasets = c(
    "Esrp2KO_sham24_R1",
    "Normal_SHAM24_R2"
  ),
  samples = c(
    "Esrp2KO",
    "Normal"
  )
)

output.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/UMAPcoords/"
if (!dir.exists(output.dir)) {
  dir.create(output.dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

for (i in 1:nrow(samples)) {
  sample_name <- samples$samples[i]
  dataset <- samples$datasets[i]
  folder <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/counts/"
  input.dir <- paste0(folder, "GRCm39_", dataset, "/outs/filtered_feature_bc_matrix/")
  
  tryCatch({
    seurat_obj <- SeuratPipeline(input.dir, sample_name, 
                         output_dir = "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/plots/", 
                         plots = TRUE, rds = TRUE,
                         species = "mouse", remove_mac = FALSE)
    
    # Generate expression data frame without gene expression
    sample_df <- targetExpressionDF(seurat_obj, genes = "")

    # Add sample and target columns to the dataframe
    sample_df$size <- colSums(GetAssayData(seurat_obj, assay = "RNA", slot = "counts"))
    sample_df$sample <- sample_name

    write.csv(sample_df, paste0(output.dir, sample_name, "UMAP_coords.csv"))
    
    cat("Processed sample:", sample_name, "\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Error processing sample", sample_name, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n")
  })
}
```

### Target expression (for BRIE2)

```{r}
samples <- data.frame(
  datasets = c(
    "Esrp2KO_sham24_R1",
    "Normal_SHAM24_R2"
  ),
  samples = c(
    "Esrp2KO",
    "Normal"
  )
)

genes <- c(
  "Kras",
  "Dgkd",
  "Nf2",
  "Slk",
  "Lsm14b"
)

output.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/UMAPcoords/"
if (!dir.exists(output.dir)) {
  dir.create(output.dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

for (i in 1:nrow(samples)) {
  sample_name <- samples$samples[i]
  dataset <- samples$datasets[i]
  folder <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/RDS/"
  input.dir <- paste0(folder, sample_name, ".rds")
  
  tryCatch({
    seurat_obj <- readRDS(input.dir)
    
    # Generate expression data frame without gene expression
    sample_df <- targetExpressionDF(seurat_obj, genes = genes)

    write.csv(sample_df, paste0(output.dir, sample_name, "_targetGenes.csv"))
    
    cat("Processed sample:", sample_name, "\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Error processing sample", sample_name, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n")
  })
}
```

### integrate KO and WT

```{r}
samples <- data.frame(
  datasets = c(
    "Esrp2KO_sham24_R1",
    "Normal_SHAM24_R2"
  ),
  samples = c(
    "Esrp2KO",
    "Normal"
  )
)

output.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/integrated/"
if (!dir.exists(output.dir)) {
  dir.create(output.dir, recursive = TRUE)
}


individual <- list()
for (i in 1:nrow(samples)) {
  sample_name <- samples$samples[i]
  dataset <- samples$datasets[i]
  folder <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/counts/"
  input.dir <- paste0(folder, "GRCm39_", dataset, "/outs/filtered_feature_bc_matrix/")
  
  data <- Read10X(data.dir = input.dir)
  sample <- CreateSeuratObject(counts = data, project = sample_name, 
                               min.cells = 3, min.features = 200)
  sample <- Add_Mito_Ribo(sample, species = "mouse")
  sample <- subset(sample, subset = nFeature_RNA > 200 & nFeature_RNA < 3500 & 
                     nCount_RNA < 20000 & percent_mito < 5)
  
  # Add sample suffix to barcodes before merge
  sample <- RenameCells(sample, add.cell.id = sample_name)
  
  individual[[sample_name]] <- sample
}

obj <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y), individual)
obj <- SCTransform(obj, vst.flavor = "v2")
obj <- RunPCA(obj, verbose = FALSE)
obj <- IntegrateLayers(obj, method = HarmonyIntegration,
                       orig.reduction = "pca",
                       new.reduction = "harmony",
                       normalization.method = "SCT",
                       verbose = F)

obj <- FindNeighbors(obj, reduction = "harmony", dims = 1:30)
obj <- FindClusters(obj, resolution = 0.7, algorithm = 4)

obj <- RunUMAP(obj, dims = 1:30, reduction = "harmony")
dplot <- DimPlot(obj, reduction = "umap", split.by = "orig.ident")
ggsave(dplot, file = paste0(output.dir, "integrated_umap_orig.ident.pdf"))
dplot <- DimPlot(obj, reduction = "umap")
ggsave(dplot, file = paste0(output.dir, "integrated_umap.pdf"))
saveRDS(obj, file = paste0(output.dir, "integrated.rds"))
sce <- SingleCellExperiment(
  assays = list(counts = GetAssayData(obj, layer = "counts")),
  colData = obj@meta.data
)
suppressMessages(
  writeH5AD(sce, file = paste0(output.dir, "integrated.h5ad"))
)
```

Clustering detour
```{r clustering}
seurat_obj <- readRDS("/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/integrated/integrated.rds")

library(clustree)

# Run clustering at multiple resolutions
seurat_obj <- FindClusters(seurat_obj, resolution = 0.4, algorithm = 4)
seurat_obj <- FindClusters(seurat_obj, resolution = 0.5, algorithm = 4)
seurat_obj <- FindClusters(seurat_obj, resolution = 0.6, algorithm = 4)
seurat_obj <- FindClusters(seurat_obj, resolution = 0.7, algorithm = 4)
seurat_obj <- FindClusters(seurat_obj, resolution = 0.8, algorithm = 4)
seurat_obj <- FindClusters(seurat_obj, resolution = 1.0, algorithm = 4)

# Each call stores results in meta.data as RNA_snn_res.{value}
clustree(seurat_obj, prefix = "SCT_snn_res.")

# Get PC embeddings and cluster labels for a given resolution
library(cluster)
resolutions <- c(0.4, 0.5, 0.6, 0.7, 0.8)
# Replace prefix below with whatever grep() revealed
prefix <- "SCT_snn_res."  

pca_coords <- Embeddings(seurat_obj, "pca")[, 1:20]
dist_matrix <- dist(pca_coords)

sil_scores <- sapply(resolutions, function(r) {
  col_name <- paste0(prefix, r)
  clusters <- as.integer(seurat_obj@meta.data[[col_name]])
  sil <- silhouette(clusters, dist_matrix)
  summary(sil)$avg.width
})

data.frame(resolution = resolutions, silhouette = round(sil_scores, 4))
```
UMAP
```{r}
integrated <- readRDS("/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/integrated/integrated.rds")
output.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/integrated/"
dplot <- DimPlot(integrated, reduction = "umap", split.by = "orig.ident") +
  theme(aspect.ratio = 1)
ggsave(dplot, file = paste0(output.dir, "integrated_umap_orig.ident_split.pdf"))

output.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/UMAPcoords/"
integrated_UMAP <- targetExpressionDF(integrated, genes = "")
integrated[["RNA"]] <- JoinLayers(integrated[["RNA"]])
integrated_UMAP$size <- colSums(GetAssayData(integrated, assay = "RNA", layer = "counts"))
integrated_UMAP$sample <- ifelse(integrated$orig.ident == "WT", "WT", "KO")
write.csv(integrated_UMAP, paste0(output.dir, "integrated_UMAP_coords.csv"))
```


### bamsort whole gene
```{r}
input.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/bamsort/"
output.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/bamsort/reads/"

raw_cellIDs_df <-  read.csv("/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/raw_cellIDs/all_raw_cellIDs.csv")
raw_cellIDs <- split(raw_cellIDs_df$cellID, raw_cellIDs_df$sample)


samples <- data.frame(
  samples = c(
    "Esrp2KO_sham24_R1",
    "Normal_SHAM24_R2"
  ),
  nicknames = c(
    "KO", "WT"
  )
)
process_bamsort_liver(samples, input.dir, output.dir, raw_cellIDs)

#minimums
input_dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/bamsort/reads/"

process_all_set_minimumsv6("liver", samples$samples, input_dir, 
                           TRUE, paste0(input_dir, "/minimum/"), 
                           min_reads_cell = 2)
#testing no minimums
process_all_set_minimumsv6("liver", samples$samples, input_dir, 
                           TRUE, paste0(input_dir, "/minimum_none/"))
```


## SALVE

### First look
From the bamsort, what are the reads and frequencies? Are the targets above background? Is there any evidence for index hopping in the pooled samples?
```{r}
bamsort_stats <- read.csv("/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/SALVE/bamsort/nointron/all_samples_alignment_summary.txt")
stats <- bamsort_stats %>%
  select(Sample, Target, Rows, Total_Reads) %>%
  rename(Name = Sample, Region = Target, UMI = Rows, Reads = Total_Reads) %>% 
  mutate(Sample = ifelse(grepl("WT", Name), "WT", "KO"), Target = sapply(strsplit(Name, "_"), tail, 1)) %>%
  #mutate(Target = ifelse(grepl("Slk", Target), "Slk", Target)) %>%
  select(-Name) %>% relocate(Target)

df <- stats %>%
  mutate(is_match = case_when(
    Target == Region ~ TRUE,
    str_detect(Target, fixed(Region)) ~ TRUE,
    TRUE ~ FALSE
  ))

# Plot
ggplot(df, aes(x = Target, y = UMI, fill = is_match)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_grid(Sample ~ Region) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#E41A1C", "FALSE" = "#377EB8"),
    labels = c("TRUE" = "Matching", "FALSE" = "Non-matching"),
    name = "Target-Region Match"
  ) +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
    strip.background = element_rect(fill = "grey90"),
    panel.spacing = unit(0.5, "lines")
  ) +
  labs(
    x = "Target",
    y = "UMI Count",
    title = "UMI Counts by Target and Region",
    subtitle = "Samples shown separately"
  )
```

Index hopping
```{r}
# Define combinations to test based on pooling
pools <- tribble(
  ~Sample, ~Target, ~Pool,
  "WT",    "Kras",   "WT_Pool1",
  "WT",    "Slkv3",  "WT_Pool1",
  "WT",    "Lsm14b", "WT_Pool1",
  "WT",    "Dgkd",   "WT_Pool2",
  "WT",    "Nf2",    "WT_Pool2",
  "WT",    "Slkv4",  "WT_Pool2",
  "KO",    "Kras",   "KO_Pool1",
  "KO",    "Slkv3",  "KO_Pool1",
  "KO",    "Lsm14b", "KO_Pool1",
  "KO",    "Dgkd",   "KO_Pool1",
  "KO",    "Nf2",    "KO_Pool2",
  "KO",    "Slkv4",  "KO_Pool2"
)

# define cross contamination
cross_pairs <- pools %>%
  inner_join(pools, by = c("Sample", "Pool"), suffix = c("_source", "_region")) %>%
  filter(Target_source != Target_region) %>%
  rename(Target = Target_source, Region = Target_region) %>%
  select(Sample, Pool, Target, Region)

# Slkv4 is not in df. Check and warn.
targets_in_pools <- unique(pools$Target)
targets_in_data <- unique(c(df$Target, df$Region))
missing <- setdiff(targets_in_pools, targets_in_data)
if (length(missing) > 0) {
  cat("WARNING: These targets are in pool definitions but not in data:",
      paste(missing, collapse = ", "), "\n")
  cat("Pairs involving these targets will have no data.\n\n")
}

bleed <- cross_pairs %>%
  left_join(df, by = c("Sample", "Target", "Region")) %>%
  select(Sample, Pool, Target, Region, UMI, Reads)
on_target <- df %>%
  filter(is_match == TRUE) %>%
  select(Sample, Region, on_target_UMI = UMI)

# true negatives
not_pooled_bg <- df %>%
  filter(is_match == FALSE) %>%
  left_join(pools, by = c("Sample", "Target")) %>%
  rename(source_pool = Pool) %>%
  left_join(
    pools %>% rename(Region = Target, region_pool = Pool),
    by = c("Sample", "Region")
  ) %>%
  filter(source_pool != region_pool | is.na(source_pool) | is.na(region_pool)) %>%
  group_by(Sample, Region) %>%
  summarise(
    bg_mean_UMI = mean(UMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    bg_sd_UMI = sd(UMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    bg_median_UMI = median(UMI, na.rm = TRUE),
    bg_targets = paste(Target, collapse = ","),
    n_bg = n(),
    .groups = "drop"
  )


comparison <- bleed %>%
  left_join(on_target, by = c("Sample", "Region")) %>%
  left_join(not_pooled_bg, by = c("Sample", "Region")) %>%
  mutate(
    pct_of_on_target = (UMI / on_target_UMI) * 100,
    fold_over_bg = UMI / bg_mean_UMI,
    z_score = (UMI - bg_mean_UMI) / bg_sd_UMI,
    is_elevated = UMI > (bg_mean_UMI + 2 * bg_sd_UMI)
  ) %>%
  arrange(Sample, Pool, desc(pct_of_on_target))

print(comparison)

plot_data <- comparison %>%
  filter(!is.na(UMI)) %>%
  mutate(label = paste0(Target, " -> ", Region))

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = reorder(label, -pct_of_on_target),
                      y = pct_of_on_target,
                      fill = Pool)) +
  geom_col() +
  facet_wrap(~Sample, scales = "free_x") +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 8)) +
  labs(
    x = "Source Target -> Aligned Region",
    y = "% of On-Target UMI",
    title = "Cross-Contamination: Co-Pooled Target Bleed",
    subtitle = "Each bar = UMI from source Target aligning to a different Target's Region"
  )

# Compare the SAME Target-Region pair across pools where it IS vs IS NOT co-pooled.
# If the ratio is ~1, it's off-target capture, not bleed.
off_target <- df %>%
  filter(is_match == FALSE) %>%
  left_join(pools, by = c("Sample", "Target")) %>%
  rename(source_pool = Pool) %>%
  left_join(
    pools %>% rename(Region = Target, region_pool = Pool),
    by = c("Sample", "Region")
  ) %>%
  mutate(co_pooled = !is.na(source_pool) & !is.na(region_pool) & source_pool == region_pool) %>%
  left_join(on_target, by = c("Sample", "Region")) %>%
  mutate(pct_of_on_target = (UMI / on_target_UMI) * 100)

ggplot(off_target %>% filter(!is.na(pct_of_on_target)),
       aes(x = reorder(paste0(Target, " -> ", Region), -pct_of_on_target),
           y = pct_of_on_target,
           fill = co_pooled)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  facet_wrap(~Sample, scales = "free_x") +
  theme_bw() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, size = 7)) +
  labs(
    x = "Source Target -> Aligned Region",
    y = "% of On-Target UMI",
    fill = "Co-Pooled",
    title = "Off-Target Signal: Co-Pooled vs Not Co-Pooled",
    subtitle = "If bars are similar height, signal is off-target capture, not bleed"
  )
```


### bamsort
Run this once first to get raw cellIDs:
```{r raw_cellIDs}
# Load and save raw cell IDs from 10X data
raw_cellIDs <- list()
output_dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/raw_cellIDs" 

# Create output directory if it doesn't exist
if (!dir.exists(output_dir)) {
  dir.create(output_dir, recursive = TRUE)
}

samples <- data.frame(
  datasets = c(
    "Esrp2KO_sham24_R1",
    "Normal_SHAM24_R2"
  ),
  samples = c(
    "Esrp2KO",
    "Normal"
  )
)

all_cellIDs <- data.frame(cellID = character(), sample = character(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

for (i in 1:nrow(samples)) {
  dataset_name <- samples$datasets[i]
  sample_name <- samples$samples[i]
  folder <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/counts/"
  rawDataFolder <- paste0(folder, "GRCm39_", dataset_name, "/outs/raw_feature_bc_matrix/")
  
  tryCatch({
    rawdata <- Read10X(rawDataFolder)
    umi_counts <- colSums(rawdata)
    cell_ids <- names(umi_counts[umi_counts > 100]) # keep only cells with transcriptomes
    raw_cellIDs[[sample_name]] <- cell_ids
    cat("Loaded", length(cell_ids), "raw cellIDs for sample", sample_name, "\n")
    
    # Add to the combined dataframe
    sample_df <- data.frame(
      cellID = cell_ids,
      sample = rep(sample_name, length(cell_ids)),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
    all_cellIDs <- rbind(all_cellIDs, sample_df)
    
    # Save individual sample's cell IDs to CSV
    sample_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0(sample_name, "_raw_cellIDs.csv"))
    write.csv(data.frame(cellID = cell_ids), sample_file, row.names = FALSE)
    cat("Saved", length(cell_ids), "cell IDs to", sample_file, "\n")
    
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Error processing", dataset_name, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n")
  })
  
  if (exists("rawdata")) {
    rm(rawdata)
    gc()
  }
}

# Save the combined cell IDs to a single CSV
combined_file <- file.path(output_dir, "all_raw_cellIDs.csv")
write.csv(all_cellIDs, combined_file, row.names = FALSE)
cat("Saved combined cell IDs to", combined_file, "\n")

# To easily load this data in the future:
# raw_cellIDs_df <- read.csv("path/to/output/directory/all_raw_cellIDs.csv")
# raw_cellIDs <- split(raw_cellIDs_df$cellID, raw_cellIDs_df$sample)
```

Run bamsort_combined (alignment_reads and splice) first.
Making full and minimum filtered lists:
```{r}
input.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/SALVE/bamsort/nointron/v4/"
output.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/SALVE/bamsort/nointron/v4/reads/"

raw_cellIDs_df <-  read.csv("/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/raw_cellIDs/all_raw_cellIDs.csv")
raw_cellIDs <- split(raw_cellIDs_df$cellID, raw_cellIDs_df$sample)


samples <- data.frame(
  samples = c(
    "Esrp2KO",
    "Normal"
  ),
  nicknames = c(
    "KO", "WT"
  )
)
process_bamsort_liver(samples, input.dir, 
            output.dir, raw_cellIDs, targets = c("Slkv3", "Dgkd", "Lsm14b", "Kras", "Slkv4", "Nf2"))

#minimums
input_dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/SALVE/bamsort/nointron/v4/reads/"

process_all_set_minimumsv6("liver", samples$samples, input_dir, 
                           TRUE, output_dir = paste0(input_dir, "minimum/"), 
                           min_reads = 2, min_umi = 2)
```



## bulk
### values from rMATS

```{r}
# --- Data ---
df_mean <- data.frame(
  gene = rep(c("Kras exon 5", "Nf2 exon 15"), each = 2),
  condition = rep(c("WT", "KO"), 2),
  mean_psi = c(0.4240, 0.0620, 0.9330, 0.0885)
)

df_dots <- data.frame(
  gene = rep(c("Kras exon 5", "Kras exon 5", "Nf2 exon 15", "Nf2 exon 15"), each = 2),
  condition = rep(c("WT", "KO"), 4),
  psi = c(0.428, 0.049, 0.42, 0.075, 0.919, 0.093, 0.947, 0.084)
)

df_mean$condition <- factor(df_mean$condition, levels = c("WT", "KO"))
df_dots$condition <- factor(df_dots$condition, levels = c("WT", "KO"))

# --- Plot ---
p <- ggplot(df_mean, aes(x = condition, y = mean_psi, fill = condition)) +
  geom_col(width = 0.6, color = "black", linewidth = 0.4) +
  geom_point(
    data = df_dots,
    aes(x = condition, y = psi),
    size = 2.5, shape = 21, fill = "black", color = "black"
  ) +
  facet_wrap(~gene) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("WT" = "#4A90D9", "KO" = "#D94A4A")) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(0, 1), breaks = seq(0, 1, 0.2)) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = "PSI") +
  theme_classic(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    legend.position = "none",
    strip.background = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 13)
  )
p
ggsave("/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/psi_rMATS_barplot.pdf", 
       p, width = 4.5, height = 3.5)
```

# Joint Dataset
## Joint - separate samples
### joining
```{r}
samples <- c(
    "Esrp2KO",
    "Normal"
)
SALVE.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/SALVE/bamsort/nointron/reads/"
GEX.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/UMAPcoords/"

joint_data <- list()

for (i in 1:length(samples)) {
  sample_name <- samples[i]
  
  # Read all data files
  salve_files <- paste0(SALVE.dir, c("v3", "v4"), "/minimum/", sample_name, "_liver_filtered.csv")
  salve_files <- salve_files[file.exists(salve_files)]
  #gex_file <- paste0(GEX.dir, sample_name, "_GEX_filtered.csv")
  umap_file <- paste0(GEX.dir, sample_name, "UMAP_coords.csv")
  
  salve_list <- lapply(salve_files, function(f) {
    df <- read.csv(f)
    df$total <- NULL
    df
  })
  salve_data <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "cellID", all = TRUE), salve_list)
  salve_data[is.na(salve_data)] <- 0
  salve_data[-1] <- log1p(salve_data[-1])
  #gex_data <- if(file.exists(gex_file)) read.csv(gex_file) else NULL
  umap_data <- if(file.exists(umap_file)) read.csv(umap_file, row.names = "X") else NULL
  
  # Get cellIDs from UMAP df
  all_cells <- as.character(umap_data$cellID)
  all_cells <- unique(all_cells)
  
  # Create base dataframe
  result <- data.frame(cellID = all_cells)
  
  # Add UMAP data
  if (!is.null(umap_data)) {
    umap_processed <- umap_data %>%
      select(-V2, -sample)
    result <- left_join(result, umap_processed, by = "cellID")
  }
  
  # Add GEX data
  # if (!is.null(gex_data)) {
  #   gex_processed <- gex_data %>%
  #     mutate(cellID = as.character(cellID)) %>%
  #     select(cellID, total, US)
  #   result <- left_join(result, gex_processed, by = "cellID") %>%
  #     mutate(GEX = log1p(total)) %>%
  #     mutate(GEX.US = log1p(US)) %>%
  #     select(-total, -US)
  # } else {
  #   result$GEX <- 0
  # }
  
  # Add SALVE data
  if (!is.null(salve_data)) {
    result <- left_join(result, salve_data, by = "cellID")
  }

  result[is.na(result)] <- 0
  
  joint_data[[sample_name]] <- result
  cat("Processed", sample_name, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
output_dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/joint/plots/"
#cat("\nSample\tTotal_cells\tboth\t10X_only\tSALVE_only\n")

# Process each dataset in the joint_data list
for (sample_name in names(joint_data)) {
  current_df <- joint_data[[sample_name]]

  # both <- current_df %>% filter(GEX != 0 & SALVE != 0)
  # either <- current_df %>% filter(GEX != 0 | SALVE != 0)
  # onlySingleCell <- current_df %>% 
  #   filter(GEX != 0) %>%
  #   filter(!(cellID %in% both$cellID))
  # onlySALVE <- current_df %>% 
  #   filter(SALVE != 0) %>%
  #   filter(!(cellID %in% both$cellID))
  # 
  # cat(sample_name, "\t",
  #     nrow(current_df), "\t",
  #     nrow(both), "\t",
  #     nrow(onlySingleCell), "\t",
  #     nrow(onlySALVE), "\n")

  cat(sample_name, "Maximums:\nKras: ", max(current_df$Kras),
      "\nDgkd: ", max(current_df$Dgkd),
      "\nLsm14b: ", max(current_df$Lsm14b),
      "\nSlk: ", max(current_df$Slkv3),
      "\nNf2: ", max(current_df$Nf2), "\n")

  # plotUMAP(current_df, colorby = Kras,
  #        paste0(sample_name, ": Kras VIE"),
  #        output_dir,
  #        paste0(sample_name, "_Kras.pdf"),
  #        comparison = FALSE, color = "red")
  # plotUMAP(current_df, colorby = Dgkd,
  #        paste0(sample_name, ": Dgkd VIE"),
  #        output_dir,
  #        paste0(sample_name, "_Dgkd.pdf"),
  #        comparison = FALSE, color = "red")
  # plotUMAP(current_df, colorby = Lsm14b,
  #        paste0(sample_name, ": Lsm14b VIE"),
  #        output_dir,
  #        paste0(sample_name, "_Lsm14b.pdf"),
  #        comparison = FALSE, color = "red")
  # plotUMAP(current_df, colorby = Slkv3,
  #        paste0(sample_name, ": Slk VIE"),
  #        output_dir,
  #        paste0(sample_name, "_Slkv3.pdf"),
  #        comparison = FALSE, color = "red")
  # plotUMAP(current_df, colorby = Nf2,
  #        paste0(sample_name, ": Nf2 VIE"),
  #        output_dir,
  #        paste0(sample_name, "_Nf2.pdf"),
  #        comparison = FALSE, color = "red")

  
  #Save CSVs
  # write.csv(both, paste0(output_dir, sample_name, "_both.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  # write.csv(onlySingleCell, paste0(output_dir, sample_name, "_onlySingleCell.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  # write.csv(onlySALVE, paste0(output_dir, sample_name, "_onlySALVE.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
  # write.csv(current_df, paste0(output_dir, sample_name, "_all.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}
```

```{r}
plot_sc_expression <- function(joint_data, columns,
                                labels = c("Group 1", "Group 2"),
                                zero_threshold = 0) {
  # labels[1] matches joint_data[[1]], labels[2] matches joint_data[[2]]
  # Plot order: reverse so labels[2] (WT) appears first on x-axis
  plot_order <- rev(labels)
  palette <- setNames(c("#DD8452", "#4C72B0"), labels)

  combined <- bind_rows(
    joint_data[[1]] %>% select(all_of(columns)) %>% mutate(Group = labels[1]),
    joint_data[[2]] %>% select(all_of(columns)) %>% mutate(Group = labels[2])
  ) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols = all_of(columns), names_to = "Gene", values_to = "Value") %>%
    mutate(
      Gene = factor(Gene, levels = columns),
      Group = factor(Group, levels = plot_order),
      Expressing = Value > zero_threshold
    )

  prop_data <- combined %>%
    group_by(Gene, Group) %>%
    summarise(
      n_total = n(),
      n_expr = sum(Expressing),
      pct = 100 * n_expr / n_total,
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  p_bar <- ggplot(prop_data, aes(x = Group, y = pct, fill = Group)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = paste0(n_expr, "/", n_total)),
              vjust = -0.5, size = 3) +
    facet_wrap(~ Gene, nrow = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      strip.text = element_text(face = "italic", size = 11),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(y = "% Expressing")

  expr_only <- combined %>% filter(Expressing)

  p_violin <- ggplot(expr_only, aes(x = Group, y = Value, fill = Group)) +
    geom_violin(scale = "width", alpha = 0.3, trim = TRUE) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = Group), width = 0.1, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.4) +
    facet_wrap(~ Gene, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_y_log10() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
    scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      strip.text = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(y = "Expression (log scale)", fill = NULL, color = NULL)

  p_bar / p_violin + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 2.5))
}

columns <- c("Kras", "Dgkd", "Lsm14b", "Nf2", "Slkv3")
p <- plot_sc_expression(joint_data, columns, labels = c("Esrp2KO", "WT"))
print(p)
```

### Pseudobulk
Let's look at counts as if this were bulk.
We expect the following trends when comparing KO vs WT:
Kras down
Nf2 down
Dgkd up
Slk down
Lsm14b up

```{r}
WT <- joint_data[["Normal"]]
KO <- joint_data[["Esrp2KO"]]
targets <- c("Kras", "Nf2", "Dgkd", "Slkv3", "Lsm14b")
KO[targets] <- expm1(KO[targets])
WT[targets] <- expm1(WT[targets])
cat("KO vs WT:\n")
for (target in targets) {
  compare <- ifelse(sum(KO[[target]]) > sum(WT[[target]]), "up", "down")
  cat(target, "\t", compare, "\t", sum(KO[[target]]), "vs", sum(WT[[target]]), "\n")
}
cat("\nKO vs WT (normalized by cell count):\n")
for (target in targets) {
  norm_KO <- sum(KO[[target]]) / nrow(KO)
  norm_WT <- sum(WT[[target]]) / nrow(WT)
  compare <- ifelse(norm_KO > norm_WT, "up", "down")
  cat(target, "\t", compare, "\t", norm_KO, "vs", norm_WT, "\n")
}
```

Normalizing for GEX counts per gene
```{r load}
samples <- c(
    "Esrp2KO",
    "Normal"
)
SALVE.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/SALVE/bamsort/nointron/reads/"
GEX.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/bamsort/reads/minimum/"
umap.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/UMAPcoords/"

joint_data <- list()

for (i in 1:length(samples)) {
  sample_name <- samples[i]
  
  # Read all data files
  salve_files <- paste0(SALVE.dir, c("v3", "v4"), "/minimum/", sample_name, "_liver_filtered.csv")
  salve_files <- salve_files[file.exists(salve_files)]
  gex_file <- paste0(GEX.dir, sample_name, "*_liver_filtered.csv")
  umap_file <- paste0(umap.dir, sample_name, "UMAP_coords.csv")
  
  salve_list <- lapply(salve_files, function(f) {
    df <- read.csv(f)
    df$total <- NULL
    df
  })
  salve_data <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "cellID", all = TRUE), salve_list)
  salve_data[is.na(salve_data)] <- 0
  #salve_data[-1] <- log1p(salve_data[-1])
  gex_matches <- Sys.glob(gex_file)
  gex_data <- if (length(gex_matches) > 0) read.csv(gex_matches[1]) else NULL
  #gex_data[-1] <- log1p(gex_data[-1])
  umap_data <- if(file.exists(umap_file)) read.csv(umap_file, row.names = "X") else NULL
  
  # Get cellIDs from UMAP df
  all_cells <- as.character(umap_data$cellID)
  all_cells <- unique(all_cells)
  
  # Create base dataframe
  result <- data.frame(cellID = all_cells)
  
  # Add UMAP data
  if (!is.null(umap_data)) {
    umap_processed <- umap_data %>%
      select(-V2, -sample)
    result <- left_join(result, umap_processed, by = "cellID")
  }
  
  # Add GEX data
  if (!is.null(gex_data)) {
    gex_processed <- gex_data %>%
      mutate(cellID = as.character(cellID)) %>%
      select(-total) %>%
      rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_GEX"), -cellID)
    result <- left_join(result, gex_processed, by = "cellID")
  } else {
    result$GEX <- 0
  }
  
  # Add SALVE data
  if (!is.null(salve_data)) {
    salve_processed <- salve_data %>%
      rename(Slk = Slkv3) %>%
      rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_SALVE"), -cellID)
    result <- left_join(result, salve_processed, by = "cellID")
  }

  result[is.na(result)] <- 0
  
  joint_data[[sample_name]] <- result
  cat("Processed", sample_name, "\n")
}
```

```{r}
WT <- joint_data[["Normal"]]
KO <- joint_data[["Esrp2KO"]]
targets <- c("Kras", "Nf2", "Dgkd", "Slk", "Lsm14b")
gex_cols <- paste0(targets, "_GEX")
#KO[gex_cols] <- expm1(KO[gex_cols])
#WT[gex_cols] <- expm1(WT[gex_cols])



cat("GEX\nKO vs WT:\n")
for (i in seq_along(targets)) {
  col <- gex_cols[i]
  compare <- ifelse(sum(KO[[col]]) > sum(WT[[col]]), "up", "down")
  cat(targets[i], "\t", compare, "\t", sum(KO[[col]]), "vs", sum(WT[[col]]), "\n")
}

cat("\nKO vs WT (normalized by cell count):\n")
for (i in seq_along(targets)) {
  col <- gex_cols[i]
  norm_KO <- sum(KO[[col]]) / nrow(KO)
  norm_WT <- sum(WT[[col]]) / nrow(WT)
  compare <- ifelse(norm_KO > norm_WT, "up", "down")
  cat(targets[i], "\t", compare, "\t", norm_KO, "vs", norm_WT, "\n")
}

#now normalize SALVE by GEX
salve_cols <- paste0(targets, "_SALVE")
#KO[salve_cols] <- expm1(KO[salve_cols])
#WT[salve_cols] <- expm1(WT[salve_cols])
cat("\n\nSALVE\nKO vs WT (normalized by GEX):\n")
for (i in seq_along(targets)) {
  gex_col <- gex_cols[i]
  salve_col <- salve_cols[i]
  norm_KO <- sum(KO[[salve_col]]) / sum(KO[[gex_col]])
  norm_WT <- sum(WT[[salve_col]]) / sum(WT[[gex_col]])
  compare <- ifelse(norm_KO > norm_WT, "up", "down")
  cat(targets[i], "\t", compare, "\t", norm_KO, "vs", norm_WT, "\n")
}
```

### VIE trends
```{r}
plot_composition <- function(joint_data, targets, expected,
                              labels = c("Group 1", "Group 2"),
                              zero_threshold = 0) {
  
  gex_cols   <- paste0(targets, "_GEX")
  salve_cols <- paste0(targets, "_SALVE")
  salve_cols[targets == "Slk"] <- "Slkv3_SALVE"
  
  plot_order <- rev(labels)
  palette <- setNames(c("#DD8452", "#4C72B0"), labels)
  
  target_labels <- setNames(
    paste0(targets, "\n(Expected: ", expected[targets], ")"),
    targets
  )
  target_labeller <- as_labeller(target_labels)
  
  build_long <- function(df, label) {
    rows <- list()
    for (i in seq_along(targets)) {
      rows[[i]] <- data.frame(
        Target = targets[i],
        Group  = label,
        GEX    = df[[gex_cols[i]]],
        SALVE  = df[[salve_cols[i]]],
        stringsAsFactors = FALSE
      )
    }
    bind_rows(rows)
  }
  
  combined <- bind_rows(
    build_long(joint_data[[1]], labels[1]),
    build_long(joint_data[[2]], labels[2])
  ) %>%
    mutate(
      Target = factor(Target, levels = targets),
      Group  = factor(Group, levels = plot_order)
    )
  
  # --- Row 1: Mean counts per cell (GEX and SALVE) ---
  mean_data <- combined %>%
    group_by(Target, Group) %>%
    summarise(
      salve_per_cell = sum(SALVE) / n(),
      gex_per_cell   = sum(GEX)   / n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    pivot_longer(
      cols = c(gex_per_cell, salve_per_cell),
      names_to = "Metric", values_to = "Value"
    ) %>%
    mutate(Metric = factor(Metric,
      levels = c("gex_per_cell", "salve_per_cell"),
      labels = c("GEX", "SALVE")
    ))
  
  p_mean <- ggplot(mean_data, aes(x = Group, y = Value, fill = Group)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.2f", Value)), vjust = -0.3, size = 2.5) +
    facet_grid(Metric ~ Target, scales = "free_y",
               labeller = labeller(Target = target_labeller)) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      strip.text.x = element_text(face = "italic", size = 10, lineheight = 1.2),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(y = "Mean counts\nper cell")
  
  # --- Row 2: SALVE / GEX ratio ---
  ratio_data <- combined %>%
    group_by(Target, Group) %>%
    summarise(
      ratio = 100 * sum(SALVE) / sum(GEX),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  p_ratio <- ggplot(ratio_data, aes(x = Group, y = ratio, fill = Group)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", ratio)), vjust = -0.3, size = 2.5) +
    facet_wrap(~ Target, nrow = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.2))) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      strip.text = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(y = "SALVE / GEX (%)")
  
  # --- Row 3: % cells expressing SALVE ---
  cell_pct <- combined %>%
    mutate(Expressing = SALVE > zero_threshold) %>%
    group_by(Target, Group) %>%
    summarise(
      n_total = n(),
      n_expr  = sum(Expressing),
      pct     = 100 * n_expr / n_total,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  p_bar <- ggplot(cell_pct, aes(x = Group, y = pct, fill = Group)) +
    geom_col(width = 0.6, alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_text(aes(label = paste0(n_expr, "/", n_total)), vjust = -0.5, size = 2.8) +
    facet_wrap(~ Target, nrow = 1) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
    scale_y_continuous(expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.15))) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "none",
      strip.text = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(y = "% Cells SALVE")
  
  # --- Row 4: Violin of SALVE counts in expressing cells ---
  expr_only <- combined %>% filter(SALVE > zero_threshold)
  
  p_violin <- ggplot(expr_only, aes(x = Group, y = SALVE, fill = Group)) +
    geom_violin(scale = "width", alpha = 0.3, trim = TRUE) +
    geom_boxplot(width = 0.15, alpha = 0.6, outlier.shape = NA) +
    geom_jitter(aes(color = Group), width = 0.1, size = 0.8, alpha = 0.4) +
    facet_wrap(~ Target, nrow = 1, scales = "free_y") +
    scale_y_log10() +
    scale_fill_manual(values = palette) +
    scale_color_manual(values = palette) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 11) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "bottom",
      strip.text = element_blank(),
      axis.title.x = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
    ) +
    labs(y = "SALVE (log scale)", fill = NULL, color = NULL)
  
  p_mean / p_ratio / p_bar / p_violin + plot_layout(heights = c(2, 1, 1, 2.5))
}

expected <- c(Kras = "down", Nf2 = "down", Dgkd = "up", Slk = "down", Lsm14b = "up")

p <- plot_composition(joint_data,
                       targets  = c("Kras", "Nf2", "Dgkd", "Slk", "Lsm14b"),
                       expected = expected,
                       labels   = c("Esrp2KO", "WT"))
print(p)
```



## Joint - integrated
### joining
```{r}
samples <- c(
    "Esrp2KO",
    "Normal"
)

SALVE.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/SALVE/bamsort/nointron/v4/reads/"
GEX.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/bamsort/reads/minimum_none/"
umap.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/UMAPcoords/"

# Get cellIDs from UMAP df
umap_file <- paste0(umap.dir, "integrated_UMAP_coords.csv")
umap_data <- if(file.exists(umap_file)) read.csv(umap_file, row.names = "X") else NULL
all_cells <- as.character(umap_data$cellID)
all_cells <- unique(all_cells)
result <- data.frame(cellID = all_cells)
umap_processed <- umap_data %>%
  select(-V2, -sample)
result <- left_join(result, umap_processed, by = "cellID")

salve_combined <- data.frame()
gex_combined <- data.frame()

for (i in 1:length(samples)) {
  sample_name <- samples[i]
  prefix <- paste0(sample_name, "_")
  
  # Read all data files
  #salve_files <- paste0(SALVE.dir, c("v3", "v4"), "/minimum/", sample_name, "_liver_filtered.csv")
  salve_files <- paste0(SALVE.dir, "/minimum/", sample_name, "_liver_filtered.csv")
  salve_files <- salve_files[file.exists(salve_files)]
  gex_file <- paste0(GEX.dir, sample_name, "*_liver_filtered.csv")
  
  salve_list <- lapply(salve_files, function(f) {
    df <- read.csv(f)
    df$total <- NULL
    df
  })
  salve_data <- Reduce(function(x, y) merge(x, y, by = "cellID", all = TRUE), salve_list)
  salve_data[is.na(salve_data)] <- 0
  salve_data <- salve_data %>% select(-any_of("Slkv4"))
  gex_matches <- Sys.glob(gex_file)
  gex_data <- if (length(gex_matches) > 0) read.csv(gex_matches[1]) else NULL
  
  salve_data$cellID <- paste0(prefix, salve_data$cellID)
  gex_data$cellID <- paste0(prefix, gex_data$cellID)
  
  salve_combined <- bind_rows(salve_combined, salve_data)
  gex_combined <- bind_rows(gex_combined, gex_data)
}
  
# Add GEX data
gex_processed <- gex_combined %>%
  mutate(cellID = as.character(cellID)) %>%
  select(-total) %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_GEX"), -cellID)
result <- left_join(result, gex_processed, by = "cellID")

# Add SALVE data
salve_processed <- salve_combined %>%
  rename_with(~ paste0(.x, "_SALVE"), -cellID)
result <- left_join(result, salve_processed, by = "cellID")

result[is.na(result)] <- 0
result <- result %>%
  #rename(Slk_SALVE = Slkv3_SALVE) %>%
  #keep only SALVE+ cells if target detected in GEX
  mutate(across(ends_with("_SALVE"), ~ ifelse(
    get(sub("_SALVE$", "_GEX", cur_column())) == 0, 0, .x
  )))
```

```{r}
output_dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/joint/integrated/plots/"
#cat("\nSample\tTotal_cells\tboth\t10X_only\tSALVE_only\n")

current_df <- result %>%
  mutate(across(-c(cellID, UMAP1, UMAP2, cluster, size), log1p))
genes <- c("Kras", "Dgkd", "Nf2", "Slk", "Lsm14b")

# both <- current_df %>% filter(GEX != 0 & SALVE != 0)
# either <- current_df %>% filter(GEX != 0 | SALVE != 0)
# onlySingleCell <- current_df %>% 
#   filter(GEX != 0) %>%
#   filter(!(cellID %in% both$cellID))
# onlySALVE <- current_df %>% 
#   filter(SALVE != 0) %>%
#   filter(!(cellID %in% both$cellID))
# 
# cat(sample_name, "\t",
#     nrow(current_df), "\t",
#     nrow(both), "\t",
#     nrow(onlySingleCell), "\t",
#     nrow(onlySALVE), "\n")

cat("Number of cells positive:\nTarget\t\tSALVE\tGEX",
  "\nKras: \t\t", sum(current_df$Kras_SALVE > 0), "\t", sum(current_df$Kras_GEX > 0),
  "\nDgkd: \t\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_SALVE > 0), "\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_GEX > 0),
  "\nLsm14b:\t\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_SALVE > 0), "\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_GEX > 0),
  "\nSlk: \t\t", sum(current_df$Slk_SALVE > 0), "\t", sum(current_df$Slk_GEX > 0),
  "\nNf2: \t\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_SALVE > 0), "\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_GEX > 0), "\n\n")

cat("Number of cells positive:\nTarget\t\tboth\tSALVE only\tGEX only",
  "\nKras: \t\t", sum(current_df$Kras_SALVE > 0 & current_df$Kras_GEX > 0), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Kras_SALVE > 0 & current_df$Kras_GEX == 0),
      "\t", sum(current_df$Kras_SALVE == 0 & current_df$Kras_GEX > 0),
  "\nDgkd: \t\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_SALVE > 0 & current_df$Dgkd_GEX > 0), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_SALVE > 0 & current_df$Dgkd_GEX == 0),
      "\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_SALVE == 0 & current_df$Dgkd_GEX > 0),
  "\nLsm14b:\t\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_SALVE > 0 & current_df$Lsm14b_GEX > 0), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_SALVE > 0 & current_df$Lsm14b_GEX == 0),
      "\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_SALVE == 0 & current_df$Lsm14b_GEX > 0),
  "\nSlk: \t\t", sum(current_df$Slk_SALVE > 0 & current_df$Slk_GEX > 0), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Slk_SALVE > 0 & current_df$Slk_GEX == 0),
      "\t", sum(current_df$Slk_SALVE == 0 & current_df$Slk_GEX > 0),
  "\nNf2: \t\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_SALVE > 0 & current_df$Nf2_GEX > 0), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_SALVE > 0 & current_df$Nf2_GEX == 0), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_SALVE == 0 & current_df$Nf2_GEX > 0), "\n")

cat("Number of cells SALVE:\nTarget\t\tKO\tWT",
  "\nKras: \t\t", sum(current_df$Kras_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Esrp2KO_", current_df$cellID)), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Kras_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Normal_", current_df$cellID)),
  "\nDgkd: \t\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Esrp2KO_", current_df$cellID)), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_SALVE > 0 &grepl("^Normal_", current_df$cellID)),
  "\nLsm14b:\t\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Esrp2KO_", current_df$cellID)), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Normal_", current_df$cellID)),
  "\nSlk: \t\t", sum(current_df$Slk_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Esrp2KO_", current_df$cellID)), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Slk_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Normal_", current_df$cellID)),
  "\nNf2: \t\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Esrp2KO_", current_df$cellID)), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Normal_", current_df$cellID)), "\n")


plotUMAP_pair <- function(data, col1, col2, gene, output_dir, color = "red") {
  plot_single <- function(df, col_name, title) {
    df <- df[order(df[[col_name]]), ]
    df$size_flag <- ifelse(df[[col_name]] != 0, "nonzero", "zero")
    
    ggplot(df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2)) +
      geom_point(aes(color = .data[[col_name]], size = size_flag), shape = 16) +
      scale_size_manual(values = c("zero" = 0.5, "nonzero" = 1.5)) +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "gray93", high = color) +
      theme_classic() +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom",
            legend.title = element_text(size = rel(0.6)),
            legend.text = element_text(size = rel(0.6), angle = 30),
            axis.text = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks = element_blank(),
            aspect.ratio = 1) +
      labs(title = title, color = "") +
      guides(size = "none")
  }
  
  p1 <- plot_single(data, col1, paste0(gene, " SALVE"))
  p2 <- plot_single(data, col2, paste0(gene, " GEX"))
  
  combined <- p1 + p2 + plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides = "collect") &
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  ggsave(combined,
         file = paste0(output_dir, gene, "_SALVE_vs_GEX.pdf"),
         device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 5)
  
  return(combined)
}

for (gene in genes) {
  plotUMAP_pair(current_df,
                paste0(gene, "_SALVE"),
                paste0(gene, "_GEX"),
                gene, output_dir, color = "red")
}

cat("Maximum log1p value:\nTarget\t\tSALVE\tGEX",
  "\nKras: \t\t", max(current_df$Kras_SALVE), "\t", max(current_df$Kras_GEX),
  "\nDgkd: \t\t", max(current_df$Dgkd_SALVE), "\t", max(current_df$Dgkd_GEX),
  "\nLsm14b:\t\t", max(current_df$Lsm14b_SALVE), "\t", max(current_df$Lsm14b_GEX),
  "\nSlk: \t\t", max(current_df$Slk_SALVE), "\t", max(current_df$Slk_GEX),
  "\nNf2: \t\t", max(current_df$Nf2_SALVE), "\t", max(current_df$Nf2_GEX), "\n")

#plotting identity split for SALVE
plotUMAP_split <- function(data, col, gene, output_dir, color = "red") {

  # global color limits across both datasets
  max_val <- max(data[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)
  min_val <- min(data[[col]], na.rm = TRUE)

  plot_single <- function(df, title) {
    df <- df[order(df[[col]]), ]
    df$size_flag <- ifelse(df[[col]] != 0, "nonzero", "zero")

    ggplot(df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2)) +
      geom_point(aes(color = .data[[col]], size = size_flag), shape = 16) +
      scale_size_manual(values = c("zero" = 0.5, "nonzero" = 1.5)) +
      scale_color_gradient(
        low = "gray93",
        high = color,
        limits = c(min_val, max_val)
      ) +
      coord_fixed() +
      theme_classic() +
      theme(
        legend.position = "bottom",
        legend.title = element_text(size = rel(0.6)),
        legend.text = element_text(size = rel(0.6), angle = 30),
        axis.text = element_blank(),
        axis.ticks = element_blank()
      ) +
      labs(title = title, color = "") +
      guides(size = "none")
  }

  normal <- data[grepl("^Normal", data$cellID), ]
  ko     <- data[grepl("^Esrp2KO", data$cellID), ]

  p1 <- plot_single(normal, paste0(gene, " SALVE - Normal"))
  p2 <- plot_single(ko,     paste0(gene, " SALVE - Esrp2KO"))

  combined <- p1 + p2 + plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides = "collect") &
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")

  ggsave(
    combined,
    file = paste0(output_dir, gene, "_SALVE_Normal_vs_Esrp2KO.pdf"),
    device = "pdf",
    width = 10,
    height = 5
  )

  return(combined)
}

for (gene in genes) {
  plotUMAP_split(current_df,
                 paste0(gene, "_SALVE"),
                 gene, output_dir, color = "red")
}



#Save CSVs
# write.csv(both, paste0(output_dir, "integrated_both.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
# write.csv(onlySingleCell, paste0(output_dir, "integrated_onlySingleCell.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
# write.csv(onlySALVE, paste0(output_dir, "integrated_onlySALVE.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(current_df, paste0(output_dir, "integrated_all.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```

### comparing to BRIE2
```{r}
brie <- read.csv("/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/BRIE2/brie2_per_cell_target_exons.csv")
brie <- brie %>%
  mutate(cellID = paste0(ifelse(sample == "WT", "Normal", "Esrp2KO"), "_", cell_barcode))

brie_wide <- brie %>%
  mutate(target = sub("_.*", "", gene)) %>%
  pivot_wider(
    id_cols = cellID,
    names_from = target,
    values_from = c(isoform1, isoform2, psi),
    names_sep = "_"
  ) %>%
  rename_with(~ sub("^isoform1_", "", .) %>% paste0("_in_BRIE"), starts_with("isoform1_")) %>%
  rename_with(~ sub("^isoform2_", "", .) %>% paste0("_out_BRIE"), starts_with("isoform2_")) %>%
  rename_with(~ sub("^psi_", "", .) %>% paste0("_psi_BRIE"), starts_with("psi_"))
brie_wide[is.na(brie_wide)] <- 0

joint_data <- left_join(result, brie_wide, by = "cellID")
```

```{r}
#cat("\nSample\tTotal_cells\tboth\t10X_only\tSALVE_only\n")

current_df <- joint_data %>%
  select(-contains("_psi_BRIE")) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with("_SALVE"), ~ .x / get(sub("_SALVE$", "_GEX", cur_column())),
                .names = "{sub('_SALVE$', '_norm_SALVE', .col)}")) %>%
  mutate(across(ends_with("_in_BRIE"), ~ .x / get(sub("_in_BRIE$", "_GEX", cur_column())),
                .names = "{sub('_in_BRIE$', '_norm_BRIE', .col)}")) %>%
  mutate(across(contains("_norm_"), ~ replace(.x, !is.finite(.x), 0))) %>%
  mutate(across(-c(cellID, UMAP1, UMAP2, cluster, size) & !contains("_norm"), log1p))




cat("Number of cells positive:\nTarget\t\tBRIE in\tBRIE out",
  "\nKras: \t\t", sum(current_df$Kras_in_BRIE > 0), "\t", sum(current_df$Kras_out_BRIE > 0),
  "\nDgkd: \t\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_in_BRIE > 0), "\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_out_BRIE > 0),
  "\nLsm14b:\t\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_in_BRIE > 0), "\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_out_BRIE > 0),
  "\nSlk: \t\t", sum(current_df$Slk_in_BRIE > 0), "\t", sum(current_df$Slk_out_BRIE > 0),
  "\nNf2: \t\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_in_BRIE > 0), "\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_out_BRIE > 0), "\n\n")

targets <- c("Kras", "Dgkd", "Lsm14b", "Slk", "Nf2")
#for cells
for (label in c("Normal", "Esrp2KO")) {
  df <- current_df %>% filter(startsWith(cellID, paste0(label, "_")))
  
  counts <- sapply(targets, function(t) {
    salve  <- df[[paste0(t, "_SALVE")]] > 0
    brie   <- df[[paste0(t, "_in_BRIE")]] > 0
    gex    <- df[[paste0(t, "_GEX")]] > 0
    c(
      "both (SALVE & BRIE)"  = sum(salve & brie),
      "both (GEX+)"          = sum(salve & brie & gex),
      "SALVE only (all)"     = sum(salve & !brie),
      "SALVE only (GEX+)"    = sum(salve & !brie & gex),
      "BRIE only (all)"      = sum(!salve & brie),
      "BRIE only (GEX+)"     = sum(!salve & brie & gex)
    )
  })
  
  cat("\n", label, "- Number of cells positive for VIE:\n")
  print(counts)
}
# for counts
for (label in c("Normal", "Esrp2KO")) {
  df <- current_df %>% filter(startsWith(cellID, paste0(label, "_")))
  
  counts <- sapply(targets, function(t) {
    c(
      "SALVE norm" = sum(df[[paste0(t, "_norm_SALVE")]]),
      "BRIE norm"     = sum(df[[paste0(t, "_norm_BRIE")]])
    )
  })
  
  cat("\n", label, "- Total counts per target:\n")
  print(counts)
}



cat("Number of cells SALVE:\nTarget\t\tKO\tWT",
  "\nKras: \t\t", sum(current_df$Kras_norm_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Esrp2KO_", current_df$cellID)), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Kras_norm_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Normal_", current_df$cellID)),
  "\nDgkd: \t\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_norm_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Esrp2KO_", current_df$cellID)), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Dgkd_norm_SALVE > 0 &grepl("^Normal_", current_df$cellID)),
  "\nLsm14b:\t\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_norm_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Esrp2KO_", current_df$cellID)), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Lsm14b_norm_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Normal_", current_df$cellID)),
  "\nSlk: \t\t", sum(current_df$Slk_norm_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Esrp2KO_", current_df$cellID)), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Slk_norm_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Normal_", current_df$cellID)),
  "\nNf2: \t\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_norm_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Esrp2KO_", current_df$cellID)), 
      "\t", sum(current_df$Nf2_norm_SALVE > 0 & grepl("^Normal_", current_df$cellID)), "\n")

genes <- c("Kras", "Dgkd", "Nf2", "Slk", "Lsm14b")

plotUMAP_pair <- function(data, col1, col2, gene, output_dir, color = "red") {
  plot_single <- function(df, col_name, title) {
    df <- df[order(df[[col_name]]), ]
    df$size_flag <- ifelse(df[[col_name]] != 0, "nonzero", "zero")
    
    ggplot(df, aes(x = UMAP1, y = UMAP2)) +
      geom_point(aes(color = .data[[col_name]], size = size_flag), shape = 16) +
      scale_size_manual(values = c("zero" = 0.5, "nonzero" = 1.5)) +
      scale_color_gradient(low = "gray93", high = color) +
      theme_classic() +
      theme(legend.position = "bottom",
            legend.title = element_text(size = rel(0.6)),
            legend.text = element_text(size = rel(0.6), angle = 30),
            axis.text = element_blank(),
            axis.ticks = element_blank(),
            aspect.ratio = 1) +
      labs(title = title, color = "") +
      guides(size = "none")
  }
  
  p1 <- plot_single(data, col1, paste0(gene, " SALVE"))
  p2 <- plot_single(data, col2, paste0(gene, " BRIE (in)"))
  
  combined <- p1 + p2 + plot_layout(ncol = 2, guides = "collect") &
    theme(legend.position = "bottom")
  
  ggsave(combined,
         file = paste0(output_dir, gene, "_SALVE_vs_BRIE.pdf"),
         device = "pdf", width = 10, height = 5)
  
  return(combined)
}

output_dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/joint/integrated/plots/"
for (gene in genes) {
  plotUMAP_pair(current_df,
                paste0(gene, "_SALVE"),
                paste0(gene, "_in_BRIE"),
                gene, output_dir, color = "red")
}

cat("Maximum log1p value:\nTarget\t\tSALVE\tGEX",
  "\nKras: \t\t", max(current_df$Kras_SALVE), "\t", max(current_df$Kras_in_BRIE),
  "\nDgkd: \t\t", max(current_df$Dgkd_SALVE), "\t", max(current_df$Dgkd_in_BRIE),
  "\nLsm14b:\t\t", max(current_df$Lsm14b_SALVE), "\t", max(current_df$Lsm14b_in_BRIE),
  "\nSlk: \t\t", max(current_df$Slk_SALVE), "\t", max(current_df$Slk_in_BRIE),
  "\nNf2: \t\t", max(current_df$Nf2_SALVE), "\t", max(current_df$Nf2_in_BRIE), "\n")


# statistical test
test <- lapply(targets, function(t) {
  gex <- current_df[[paste0(t, "_GEX")]] > 0
  salve <- current_df[[paste0(t, "_SALVE")]] > 0
  group <- ifelse(startsWith(current_df$cellID, "Normal_"), "WT", "KO")
  
  df <- data.frame(salve = salve[gex], group = group[gex])
  
  tab <- table(df$group, df$salve)
  ft <- fisher.test(tab)
  
  wt_frac <- sum(df$salve[df$group == "WT"]) / sum(df$group == "WT")
  ko_frac <- sum(df$salve[df$group == "KO"]) / sum(df$group == "KO")
  
  data.frame(
    gene = t,
    n_WT_GEX = sum(df$group == "WT"),
    n_KO_GEX = sum(df$group == "KO"),
    frac_WT = round(wt_frac, 4),
    frac_KO = round(ko_frac, 4),
    delta = round(wt_frac - ko_frac, 4),
    odds_ratio = round(ft$estimate, 3),
    p_value = ft$p.value
  )
})

results_df <- bind_rows(test)
results_df$FDR <- p.adjust(results_df$p_value, method = "BH")
results_df$significant <- results_df$FDR < 0.05

print(results_df)




#Save CSV
write.csv(joint_data, paste0(output_dir, "integrated_all_with_BRIE.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

```
```{r scatterplot Kras}


plots <- list()
shared_max <- 0

for (label in c("Normal", "Esrp2KO")) {
  df <- current_df %>% filter(startsWith(cellID, paste0(label, "_")))
  shared_max <- max(shared_max,
                    max(df$Kras_norm_SALVE, na.rm = TRUE),
                    max(df$Kras_norm_BRIE,  na.rm = TRUE))
}
axis_lim <- c(-0.01, log1p(shared_max) * 1.05)

for (label in c("Normal", "Esrp2KO")) {
  df <- current_df %>%
    filter(startsWith(cellID, paste0(label, "_"))) %>%
    mutate(
      salve = log1p(Kras_norm_SALVE),
      brie  = log1p(Kras_norm_BRIE),
      quadrant = case_when(
        Kras_norm_SALVE > 0 & Kras_norm_BRIE > 0 ~ "Both",
        Kras_norm_SALVE > 0                       ~ "SALVE only",
        Kras_norm_BRIE  > 0                       ~ "BRIE only",
        TRUE                                      ~ "Neither"
      ),
      quadrant = factor(quadrant, levels = c("Neither", "SALVE only", "BRIE only", "Both"))
    )

  n_salve <- sum(df$Kras_norm_SALVE > 0)
  n_brie  <- sum(df$Kras_norm_BRIE > 0)
  n_both  <- sum(df$Kras_norm_SALVE > 0 & df$Kras_norm_BRIE > 0)
  n_total <- nrow(df)

  df_plot <- df %>% arrange(quadrant)

  # Nonzero subsets for marginal histograms
  df_salve_nz <- df %>% filter(Kras_norm_SALVE > 0)
  df_brie_nz  <- df %>% filter(Kras_norm_BRIE > 0)

  # Main scatter
  p_main <- ggplot(df_plot, aes(x = salve, y = brie, color = quadrant)) +
    geom_point(size = 1.2, alpha = 0.5) +
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "Neither"    = "grey85",
      "SALVE only" = "#D62728",
      "BRIE only"  = "#1F77B4",
      "Both"       = "#2CA02C"
    )) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = axis_lim, ylim = axis_lim) +
    geom_abline(slope = 1, intercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey50") +
    annotate("text", x = axis_lim[2] * 0.95, y = axis_lim[2] * 0.95,
             label = paste0("SALVE: ", n_salve, " cells"),
             hjust = 1, size = 3, color = "#D62728") +
    annotate("text", x = axis_lim[2] * 0.95, y = axis_lim[2] * 0.88,
             label = paste0("BRIE: ", n_brie, " cells"),
             hjust = 1, size = 3, color = "#1F77B4") +
    annotate("text", x = axis_lim[2] * 0.95, y = axis_lim[2] * 0.81,
             label = paste0("Both: ", n_both, " / ", n_total, " total"),
             hjust = 1, size = 3, color = "#2CA02C") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(legend.position = "none", aspect.ratio = 1) +
    labs(title = label, x = "SALVE log1p(norm)", y = "BRIE log1p(norm)")

  # Top marginal: SALVE distribution (x-axis)
  p_top <- ggplot(df_salve_nz, aes(x = salve)) +
    geom_histogram(fill = "#D62728", alpha = 0.4, bins = 30, color = NA) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = axis_lim) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))

  # Right marginal: BRIE distribution (y-axis)
  p_right <- ggplot(df_brie_nz, aes(x = brie)) +
    geom_histogram(fill = "#1F77B4", alpha = 0.4, bins = 30, color = NA) +
    coord_cartesian(xlim = axis_lim) +
    coord_flip(xlim = axis_lim) +
    theme_void() +
    theme(plot.margin = margin(0, 0, 0, 0))

  p_empty <- plot_spacer()

  plots[[label]] <- p_top + p_empty + p_main + p_right +
    plot_layout(ncol = 2, nrow = 2,
                widths = c(4, 1), heights = c(1, 4))
}

# Shared legend
legend_df <- data.frame(
  x = 1:4, y = 1:4,
  quadrant = factor(c("Neither", "SALVE only", "BRIE only", "Both"),
                    levels = c("Neither", "SALVE only", "BRIE only", "Both"))
)
p_legend <- ggplot(legend_df, aes(x, y, color = quadrant)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "Neither" = "grey85", "SALVE only" = "#D62728",
    "BRIE only" = "#1F77B4", "Both" = "#2CA02C"
  )) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom") +
  labs(color = "")
shared_legend <- cowplot::get_legend(p_legend)

final <- (plots[["Normal"]] | plots[["Esrp2KO"]]) /
  wrap_elements(shared_legend) +
  plot_layout(heights = c(10, 1))
print(final)
```



### read depth prediction
```{r}
# Load Seurat object
integrated <- readRDS("/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/integrated/integrated.rds")

# --- Step 1: Current GEX sequencing depth per sample ---
meta <- integrated@meta.data %>%
  mutate(sample = ifelse(grepl("^Normal", rownames(.)), "Normal", "Esrp2KO"))

depth <- meta %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    n_cells = n(),
    mean_reads_per_cell = round(mean(nCount_RNA), 1),
    median_reads_per_cell = round(median(nCount_RNA), 1),
    total_reads = round(sum(nCount_RNA)),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("Current GEX sequencing depth:\n")
print(as.data.frame(depth))

# --- Step 2: Fold increase needed per gene per sample ---
targets <- c("Kras", "Dgkd", "Lsm14b", "Slk", "Nf2")

fold_results <- bind_rows(lapply(c("Normal", "Esrp2KO"), function(label) {
  df <- current_df %>% filter(startsWith(cellID, paste0(label, "_")))
  
  bind_rows(lapply(targets, function(t) {
    salve_total <- sum(expm1(df[[paste0(t, "_SALVE")]]))
    brie_total  <- sum(expm1(df[[paste0(t, "_in_BRIE")]]))
    
    data.frame(
      sample = label,
      gene = t,
      SALVE_total = round(salve_total),
      BRIE_in_total = round(brie_total),
      fold_increase = if (brie_total > 0) round(salve_total / brie_total, 1) else Inf
    )
  }))
}))

cat("\nFold increase in GEX depth needed to match SALVE:\n")
print(as.data.frame(fold_results))

# --- Step 3: Projected reads per cell needed ---
projected <- fold_results %>%
  left_join(depth %>% select(sample, mean_reads_per_cell), by = "sample") %>%
  mutate(
    target_reads_per_cell = round(mean_reads_per_cell * fold_increase, 0),
    target_total_reads = round(target_reads_per_cell * depth$n_cells[match(sample, depth$sample)])
  )

cat("\nProjected sequencing requirements:\n")
print(as.data.frame(projected))

# --- Step 4: Summary across genes ---
# Use finite values only (exclude genes with 0 BRIE counts)
finite_folds <- fold_results %>% filter(is.finite(fold_increase))

summary_stats <- finite_folds %>%
  group_by(sample) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_fold = round(mean(fold_increase), 1),
    median_fold = round(median(fold_increase), 1),
    max_fold = round(max(fold_increase), 1),
    genes_with_brie = n(),
    genes_infinite = sum(targets %in% gene[fold_increase == Inf]),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

cat("\nSummary of fold increases (genes with BRIE2 counts > 0 only):\n")
print(as.data.frame(summary_stats))

cat("\nGenes with zero BRIE2 counts (would require infinite depth increase):\n")
print(fold_results %>% filter(!is.finite(fold_increase)) %>% select(sample, gene))

# --- Step 5: Downsampling analysis ---
# Subsample SALVE counts to find minimum enrichment for significance
set.seed(42)
downsample_results <- bind_rows(lapply(targets, function(t) {
  gex <- current_df[[paste0(t, "_GEX")]] > 0
  salve_raw <- expm1(current_df[[paste0(t, "_SALVE")]])
  group <- ifelse(startsWith(current_df$cellID, "Normal_"), "WT", "KO")
  
  # Only among GEX+ cells
  salve_gex <- salve_raw[gex]
  group_gex <- group[gex]
  
  # Skip if too few positive cells
  if (sum(salve_gex > 0) < 5) return(NULL)
  
  fractions <- c(1, 0.5, 0.2, 0.1, 0.05, 0.02, 0.01)
  
  bind_rows(lapply(fractions, function(f) {
    # Binomial downsample each cell's SALVE count
    downsampled <- rbinom(length(salve_gex), size = round(salve_gex), prob = f)
    
    tab <- table(group_gex, downsampled > 0)
    if (ncol(tab) < 2) {
      p <- 1
    } else {
      p <- fisher.test(tab)$p.value
    }
    
    data.frame(
      gene = t,
      fraction = f,
      n_positive_WT = sum(downsampled[group_gex == "WT"] > 0),
      n_positive_KO = sum(downsampled[group_gex == "KO"] > 0),
      p_value = p
    )
  }))
}))

if (!is.null(downsample_results) && nrow(downsample_results) > 0) {
  downsample_results$FDR <- p.adjust(downsample_results$p_value, method = "BH")
  downsample_results$significant <- downsample_results$FDR < 0.05
  
  cat("\nDownsampling analysis - minimum SALVE enrichment for significance:\n")
  print(as.data.frame(downsample_results))
  
  # Find threshold per gene
  thresholds <- downsample_results %>%
    group_by(gene) %>%
    summarise(
      min_fraction_significant = min(fraction[significant], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  cat("\nMinimum SALVE fraction retaining significance per gene:\n")
  print(as.data.frame(thresholds))
}
```


## Subset
### DEG analysis

```{r, warning=FALSE}
input.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/plots/"
output.base <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/joint/subset/"

samples <- c("Esrp2KO",
             "Normal")
targets <- c("Kras", "Nf2", "Dgkd", "Slkv3", "Lsm14b")

for (i in 1:length(samples)) {
  sample_name <- samples[i]
  input_file <- paste0(input.dir, sample_name, ".rds")
  
  tryCatch({
    seurat_obj <- readRDS(input_file)
    
    salve <- joint_data[[sample_name]]
    for (target in targets) {
      list_of_cells1 <- salve %>% filter(.data[[target]] > 0) %>%
      select(cellID) %>% unlist()
    # list_of_cells2 <- salve %>% filter(total != 0) %>%
    #   select(cellID) %>% filter(!(cellID %in% list_of_cells1)) %>% unlist()
    results <- analyze_cell_subset(seurat_obj, list_of_cells1#, 
                                   #list_of_cells2, group_names = c("MS", "noMS")
                                   )
    
    output.dir <- paste0(output.base, sample_name, "/")
    if (!dir.exists(output.dir)) {
      dir.create(output.dir, recursive = TRUE)
    }
    #save_subset_analysis(results, output_dir = output.dir)
    plot_subset_analysis(seurat_obj, results, list_of_cells1, output_dir = paste0(output.dir, "plots/"))

    cat("Processed target:", target, "\n")
    }
    cat("Processed sample:", sample_name, "\n\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Error processing sample", sample_name, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n")
  })
}

```

Rewrote some functions
```{r}
library(gprofiler2)

perform_deg_pathway_analysis <- function(seurat_obj,
                                          cells_group1,
                                          cells_group2,
                                          assay = "RNA",
                                          test_use = "wilcox",
                                          fc_threshold = 0.5,
                                          pval_threshold = 0.01,
                                          output_prefix = "DEG_analysis") {
  
  # Validate inputs
  if (!inherits(seurat_obj, "Seurat")) {
    stop("seurat_obj must be a Seurat object")
  }
  
  all_cells <- colnames(seurat_obj)
  missing_cells1 <- setdiff(cells_group1, all_cells)
  missing_cells2 <- setdiff(cells_group2, all_cells)
  
  if (length(missing_cells1) > 0) {
    warning(paste(length(missing_cells1), "cells from group1 not found in Seurat object"))
    cells_group1 <- intersect(cells_group1, all_cells)
  }
  
  if (length(missing_cells2) > 0) {
    warning(paste(length(missing_cells2), "cells from group2 not found in Seurat object"))
    cells_group2 <- intersect(cells_group2, all_cells)
  }
  
  if (length(cells_group1) == 0 || length(cells_group2) == 0) {
    stop("One or both groups have no valid cells after filtering")
  }
  
  cat(sprintf("Group 1: %d cells\n", length(cells_group1)))
  cat(sprintf("Group 2: %d cells\n", length(cells_group2)))
  
  # Create temporary identity for DEG analysis
  seurat_obj$temp_ident <- "other"
  seurat_obj$temp_ident[colnames(seurat_obj) %in% cells_group1] <- "group1"
  seurat_obj$temp_ident[colnames(seurat_obj) %in% cells_group2] <- "group2"
  
  # Subset Seurat object to only include cells from both groups
  seurat_subset <- subset(seurat_obj, cells = c(cells_group1, cells_group2))
  Idents(seurat_subset) <- "temp_ident"
  
  cat("Performing differential expression analysis...\n")
  
  # Perform DEG analysis
  # group1 vs group2: positive log2FC means higher in group1
  deg_results <- FindMarkers(
    object = seurat_subset,
    ident.1 = "group1",
    ident.2 = "group2",
    assay = assay,
    test.use = test_use,
    logfc.threshold = 0,  # Get all genes, filter later
    min.pct = 0.1,  # Gene must be expressed in at least 10% of cells in one group
    verbose = TRUE
  )
  
  # Add gene names as column
  deg_results$gene <- rownames(deg_results)
  
  # Reorder columns
  deg_results <- deg_results[, c("gene", "avg_log2FC", "pct.1", "pct.2", 
                                  "p_val", "p_val_adj")]
  
  # Sort by adjusted p-value
  deg_results <- deg_results[order(deg_results$p_val_adj), ]
  
  # Save full results
  write.csv(deg_results, 
            file = paste0(output_prefix, "_all_genes.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat(sprintf("Saved full results: %s_all_genes.csv\n", output_prefix))
  
  # Filter for significant DEGs
  deg_filtered <- deg_results %>%
    filter(abs(avg_log2FC) > fc_threshold & p_val_adj < pval_threshold)
  
  cat(sprintf("Significant DEGs: %d (|log2FC| > %.2f, adj p-val < %.2f)\n", 
              nrow(deg_filtered), fc_threshold, pval_threshold))
  cat(sprintf("  Upregulated in group1: %d\n", sum(deg_filtered$avg_log2FC > 0)))
  cat(sprintf("  Upregulated in group2: %d\n", sum(deg_filtered$avg_log2FC < 0)))
  
  # Save filtered results
  write.csv(deg_filtered,
            file = paste0(output_prefix, "_significant_genes.csv"),
            row.names = FALSE)
  cat(sprintf("Saved significant DEGs: %s_significant_genes.csv\n", output_prefix))
  
  # Pathway enrichment analysis using g:Profiler
  pathway_results <- NULL
  if (nrow(deg_filtered) > 0) {
    cat("\nPerforming pathway enrichment analysis with g:Profiler...\n")
    
    # Split into upregulated and downregulated genes
    up_genes <- deg_filtered %>% filter(avg_log2FC > 0) %>% pull(gene)
    down_genes <- deg_filtered %>% filter(avg_log2FC < 0) %>% pull(gene)
    
    pathway_results <- list()
    
    # Enrichment for upregulated genes (group1)
    if (length(up_genes) > 0) {
      cat(sprintf("  Analyzing %d upregulated genes (group1)...\n", length(up_genes)))
      gost_up <- gost(
        query = up_genes,
        organism = "mmulatta",  # Change to "mmusculus" for mouse
        significant = TRUE,
        correction_method = "g_SCS",  # g:Profiler's custom method
        sources = c("GO:BP", "GO:MF", "GO:CC", "KEGG", "REAC", "WP")
      )
      
      if (!is.null(gost_up$result)) {
        # Select available columns
        base_cols <- c("term_id", "term_name", "source", "p_value", "term_size", 
                       "query_size", "intersection_size")
        optional_cols <- c("intersection")
        available_cols <- base_cols[base_cols %in% colnames(gost_up$result)]
        optional_available <- optional_cols[optional_cols %in% colnames(gost_up$result)]
        
        pathway_results$upregulated <- gost_up$result %>%
          select(all_of(c(available_cols, optional_available))) %>%
          arrange(p_value)
        
        write.csv(pathway_results$upregulated,
                  file = paste0(output_prefix, "_pathways_group1_up.csv"),
                  row.names = FALSE)
        cat(sprintf("  Found %d enriched pathways for group1\n", 
                    nrow(pathway_results$upregulated)))
      } else {
        cat("  No significant pathways found for upregulated genes\n")
      }
    }
    
    # Enrichment for downregulated genes (group2)
    if (length(down_genes) > 0) {
      cat(sprintf("  Analyzing %d downregulated genes (group2)...\n", length(down_genes)))
      gost_down <- gost(
        query = down_genes,
        organism = "hsapiens",
        significant = TRUE,
        correction_method = "g_SCS",
        sources = c("GO:BP", "GO:MF", "GO:CC", "KEGG", "REAC", "WP")
      )
      
      if (!is.null(gost_down$result)) {
        # Select available columns
        base_cols <- c("term_id", "term_name", "source", "p_value", "term_size",
                       "query_size", "intersection_size")
        optional_cols <- c("intersection")
        available_cols <- base_cols[base_cols %in% colnames(gost_down$result)]
        optional_available <- optional_cols[optional_cols %in% colnames(gost_down$result)]
        
        pathway_results$downregulated <- gost_down$result %>%
          select(all_of(c(available_cols, optional_available))) %>%
          arrange(p_value)
        
        write.csv(pathway_results$downregulated,
                  file = paste0(output_prefix, "_pathways_group2_up.csv"),
                  row.names = FALSE)
        cat(sprintf("  Found %d enriched pathways for group2\n",
                    nrow(pathway_results$downregulated)))
      } else {
        cat("  No significant pathways found for downregulated genes\n")
      }
    }
  } else {
    cat("No significant DEGs found - skipping pathway analysis\n")
  }
  
  # Create volcano plot
  cat("\nGenerating volcano plot...\n")
  
  # Add significance category
  deg_results$significance <- "Not significant"
  deg_results$significance[deg_results$avg_log2FC > fc_threshold & 
                            deg_results$p_val_adj < pval_threshold] <- "Group1 enriched"
  deg_results$significance[deg_results$avg_log2FC < -fc_threshold & 
                            deg_results$p_val_adj < pval_threshold] <- "Group2 enriched"
  
  # Label top genes
  all_genes <- deg_results %>%
    filter(significance != "Not significant") %>%
    arrange(p_val_adj)
  
  volcano_plot <- ggplot(deg_results, aes(x = avg_log2FC, y = -log10(p_val_adj))) +
    geom_point(aes(color = significance), alpha = 0.6, size = 1.5) +
    scale_color_manual(
      values = c("Group1 enriched" = "#E64B35", 
                 "Not significant" = "grey70",
                 "Group2 enriched" = "#4DBBD5")
    ) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = c(-fc_threshold, fc_threshold), 
               linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_hline(yintercept = -log10(pval_threshold), 
               linetype = "dashed", color = "grey30", linewidth = 0.5) +
    geom_text_repel(
      data = all_genes,
      aes(label = gene),
      size = 3,
      max.overlaps = 20,
      box.padding = 0.5,
      segment.size = 0.2
    ) +
    labs(
      title = "Differential Gene Expression: Group1 vs Group2",
      x = "log2 Fold Change",
      y = "-log10(Adjusted P-value)",
      color = "Significance"
    ) +
    theme_classic(base_size = 12) +
    theme(
      legend.position = "right",
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, face = "bold"),
      axis.text = element_text(color = "black"),
      axis.title = element_text(face = "bold")
    )
  
  # Save plot
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(output_prefix, "_volcano_plot.pdf"),
    plot = volcano_plot,
    width = 10,
    height = 8,
    units = "in"
  )
  
  ggsave(
    filename = paste0(output_prefix, "_volcano_plot.png"),
    plot = volcano_plot,
    width = 10,
    height = 8,
    units = "in",
    dpi = 300
  )
  
  cat(sprintf("Saved volcano plots: %s_volcano_plot.pdf/png\n", output_prefix))
  
  # Return results
  return(list(
    all_results = deg_results,
    significant_degs = deg_filtered,
    pathway_results = pathway_results,
    volcano_plot = volcano_plot,
    n_group1 = length(cells_group1),
    n_group2 = length(cells_group2),
    parameters = list(
      fc_threshold = fc_threshold,
      pval_threshold = pval_threshold,
      test_method = test_use
    )
  ))
}

```

```{r}
input.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGS016/singleCell/Seurat/RDS/"
output.dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGS018/joint/subset/new/"

samples <- c("Invitro",
             "D195",
             "Pacute",
             "W2")
for (i in 1:length(samples)) {
  sample_name <- samples[i]
  input_file <- paste0(input.dir, sample_name, ".rds")
  
  tryCatch({
    seurat_obj <- readRDS(input_file)
    genes_to_exclude <- c("CD4", "CD8A", "CD8B")  # remove from DEG analysis
    genes_to_keep <- rownames(seurat_obj)[!rownames(seurat_obj) %in% genes_to_exclude]
    seurat_obj <- subset(seurat_obj, features = genes_to_keep)

    if (!dir.exists(output.dir)) {
      dir.create(output.dir, recursive = TRUE)
    }
    
    salve <- combined_data[[sample_name]]
    available_cols <- intersect(c("MS", "SS-MS", "SS"), colnames(salve))
    list_of_cells1 <- salve %>%
      filter(if_any(all_of(available_cols), ~ . != 0)) %>%
      select(cellID) %>%
      unlist()
    list_of_cells2 <- salve %>% filter(total != 0) %>%
      select(cellID) %>% filter(!(cellID %in% list_of_cells1)) %>% unlist()

    result <- analyze_cell_subset(
      seurat_obj,
      list_of_cells1,
      list_of_cells2,
      group_names = c("SIV_spliced", "SIV_other")
    )
    save_subset_analysis(result, paste0(output.dir, "combined_splicedvnot/", sample_name, "/"))
    
    
    cat("Processed sample:", sample_name, "\n")
  }, error = function(e) {
    cat("Error processing sample", sample_name, ":", conditionMessage(e), "\n\n")
  })
}
```


### cNMF


```{r}
# =============================================================================
# cNMF Pattern Annotation by Biological Program
# =============================================================================
# Annotates cNMF patterns using:
#   1. Preranked GSEA on gene_spectra_score (Z-scores) -- primary method
#   2. ORA on top 50 genes per pattern -- supplementary method
#
# Preranked GSEA is preferred because cNMF produces continuous gene loadings
# across all genes, and GSEA leverages the full ranked structure without an
# arbitrary top-N cutoff (Kotliar et al., eLife 2019).
# Top 50 genes for ORA follows the community standard established by
# Gavish et al., Nature 2023 for cross-study program comparison.
# =============================================================================

# =============================================================================
# Configuration
# =============================================================================
load_dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/singleCell/Seurat/RDS/"
output_dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGL002/joint/integrated/plots/cNMF/"
run_name <- "invitro"
selected_k <- 7

usage_file <- file.path(load_dir, paste0(run_name, "_usage_K", selected_k, ".csv"))
spectra_file <- file.path(load_dir, paste0(run_name, "_spectra_K", selected_k, ".csv"))
spectra_tpm_file <- file.path(load_dir, paste0(run_name, "_spectra_tpm_K", selected_k, ".csv"))
top_genes_file <- file.path(load_dir, paste0(run_name, "_top_genes_K", selected_k, ".csv"))

organism <- "Macaca mulatta"
n_top_genes_ora <- 50
gsea_pval_cutoff <- 0.05
ora_pval_cutoff <- 0.05

# =============================================================================
# 1. Load cNMF Outputs
# =============================================================================
usage <- read.csv(usage_file, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
spectra <- read.csv(spectra_file, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
spectra_tpm <- read.csv(spectra_tpm_file, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)
top_genes <- read.csv(top_genes_file, row.names = 1, check.names = FALSE)

cat("Loaded cNMF outputs:\n")
cat("  Usage matrix:", nrow(usage), "cells x", ncol(usage), "patterns\n")
cat("  Spectra (Z-score) matrix:", nrow(spectra), "genes x", ncol(spectra), "patterns\n")
cat("  Spectra (TPM) matrix:", nrow(spectra_tpm), "genes x", ncol(spectra_tpm), "patterns\n")

cat("\nTop 20 genes per pattern (by Z-score loading):\n")
for (pat in colnames(spectra)) {
  pat_scores <- spectra[[pat]]
  names(pat_scores) <- rownames(spectra)
  top_20 <- names(sort(pat_scores, decreasing = TRUE))[1:20]
  cat(paste0("  ", pat, ": ", paste(top_20, collapse = ", "), "\n"))
}

# =============================================================================
# 2. Build Gene Set Collections from MSigDB
# =============================================================================
hallmark_sets <- msigdbr(species = organism, collection = "H") %>%
  split(x = .$gene_symbol, f = .$gs_name)

reactome_sets <- msigdbr(species = organism, collection = "C2", subcollection = "CP:REACTOME") %>%
  split(x = .$gene_symbol, f = .$gs_name)

gobp_sets <- msigdbr(species = organism, collection = "C5", subcollection = "GO:BP") %>%
  split(x = .$gene_symbol, f = .$gs_name)

cat("\nGene set collections loaded:\n")
cat("  Hallmark:", length(hallmark_sets), "sets\n")
cat("  Reactome:", length(reactome_sets), "sets\n")
cat("  GO:BP:", length(gobp_sets), "sets\n")

# =============================================================================
# 3. Preranked GSEA per Pattern
# =============================================================================
# gene_spectra_score Z-scores reflect expected change in gene expression per
# unit increase in pattern usage. fgsea uses the full ranked vector per pattern
# rather than a fixed top-N cutoff (Kotliar et al., eLife 2019, Methods).

run_preranked_gsea <- function(spectra_scores, gene_sets, pval_cutoff = 0.05) {
  patterns <- colnames(spectra_scores)
  all_results <- list()

  for (pat in patterns) {
    ranks <- spectra_scores[[pat]]
    names(ranks) <- rownames(spectra_scores)
    ranks <- ranks[is.finite(ranks)]
    ranks <- sort(ranks, decreasing = TRUE)

    res <- fgsea(
      pathways = gene_sets,
      stats = ranks,
      minSize = 10,
      maxSize = 500,
      nPermSimple = 10000,
      eps = 0
    )
    res$pattern <- pat
    all_results[[pat]] <- res
  }

  combined <- rbindlist(all_results)
  combined <- combined[combined$padj < pval_cutoff, ]
  combined <- combined[order(combined$pattern, combined$padj), ]
  return(as.data.frame(combined))
}

cat("\nRunning preranked GSEA (Hallmark)...\n")
gsea_hallmark <- run_preranked_gsea(spectra, hallmark_sets, gsea_pval_cutoff)

cat("Running preranked GSEA (Reactome)...\n")
gsea_reactome <- run_preranked_gsea(spectra, reactome_sets, gsea_pval_cutoff)

cat("Running preranked GSEA (GO:BP)...\n")
gsea_gobp <- run_preranked_gsea(spectra, gobp_sets, gsea_pval_cutoff)

cat("\nTop 5 Hallmark terms per pattern (by NES):\n")
for (pat in colnames(spectra)) {
  pat_res <- gsea_hallmark[gsea_hallmark$pattern == pat, ]
  if (nrow(pat_res) == 0) {
    cat(paste0("  ", pat, ": no significant terms\n"))
    next
  }
  pat_res <- pat_res[order(abs(pat_res$NES), decreasing = TRUE), ]
  top_terms <- head(pat_res, 5)
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(top_terms))) {
    direction <- ifelse(top_terms$NES[j] > 0, "+", "-")
    term <- gsub("^HALLMARK_", "", top_terms$pathway[j])
    cat(sprintf("  %s: [%s] %s (NES=%.2f, padj=%.1e)\n",
                pat, direction, term, top_terms$NES[j], top_terms$padj[j]))
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# 4. ORA per Pattern (Top 50 Genes) -- Hypergeometric Test
# =============================================================================

get_top_n_genes <- function(spectra_scores, n = 50) {
  top_list <- list()
  for (pat in colnames(spectra_scores)) {
    scores <- spectra_scores[[pat]]
    names(scores) <- rownames(spectra_scores)
    top_list[[pat]] <- names(sort(scores, decreasing = TRUE))[1:n]
  }
  return(top_list)
}

run_ora_hypergeometric <- function(query_genes, gene_sets, background_genes,
                                   min_size = 10, max_size = 500,
                                   pval_cutoff = 0.05) {
```
