```{r}
  # One-sided Fisher/hypergeometric test for overrepresentation
  bg <- unique(background_genes)
  query <- intersect(query_genes, bg)
  N <- length(bg)
  n_query <- length(query)

  results <- list()
  for (set_name in names(gene_sets)) {
    set_genes <- intersect(gene_sets[[set_name]], bg)
    K <- length(set_genes)
    if (K < min_size || K > max_size) next

    overlap <- intersect(query, set_genes)
    k <- length(overlap)
    if (k == 0) next

    pval <- phyper(k - 1, K, N - K, n_query, lower.tail = FALSE)

    results[[length(results) + 1]] <- data.frame(
      pathway = set_name,
      pval = pval,
      overlap = k,
      set_size = K,
      query_size = n_query,
      background_size = N,
      overlap_genes = paste(overlap, collapse = ";"),
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  if (length(results) == 0) {
    return(data.frame(pathway = character(), pval = numeric(), padj = numeric(),
                      overlap = integer(), set_size = integer(),
                      query_size = integer(), background_size = integer(),
                      overlap_genes = character(), stringsAsFactors = FALSE))
  }

  res_df <- do.call(rbind, results)
  res_df$padj <- p.adjust(res_df$pval, method = "BH")
  res_df <- res_df[res_df$padj < pval_cutoff, ]
  res_df <- res_df[order(res_df$padj), ]
  return(res_df)
}

top50_per_pattern <- get_top_n_genes(spectra, n = n_top_genes_ora)
background <- rownames(spectra)

cat("\nRunning ORA on top", n_top_genes_ora, "genes per pattern (GO:BP)...\n")
ora_results <- list()
for (pat in names(top50_per_pattern)) {
  ora_results[[pat]] <- run_ora_hypergeometric(
    query_genes = top50_per_pattern[[pat]],
    gene_sets = gobp_sets,
    background_genes = background,
    pval_cutoff = ora_pval_cutoff
  )
}

cat("\nTop 5 ORA GO:BP terms per pattern:\n")
for (pat in names(ora_results)) {
  res <- ora_results[[pat]]
  if (nrow(res) == 0) {
    cat(paste0("  ", pat, ": no significant terms\n"))
    next
  }
  top_terms <- head(res, 5)
  for (j in seq_len(nrow(top_terms))) {
    cat(sprintf("  %s: %s (padj=%.1e, %d/%d genes)\n",
                pat, gsub("^GOBP_", "", top_terms$pathway[j]),
                top_terms$padj[j], top_terms$overlap[j], n_top_genes_ora))
  }
}

# =============================================================================
# 5. Visualization
# =============================================================================

# --- 5a. GSEA Hallmark NES heatmap ---
if (nrow(gsea_hallmark) > 0) {
  nes_matrix <- gsea_hallmark %>%
    select(pattern, pathway, NES) %>%
    mutate(pathway = gsub("^HALLMARK_", "", pathway)) %>%
    pivot_wider(names_from = pattern, values_from = NES, values_fill = 0) %>%
    tibble::column_to_rownames("pathway")

  nes_mat <- as.matrix(nes_matrix)
  max_abs <- max(abs(nes_mat), na.rm = TRUE)

  p_hallmark <- pheatmap::pheatmap(
    nes_mat,
    color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
    breaks = seq(-max_abs, max_abs, length.out = 101),
    cluster_cols = TRUE,
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    fontsize_row = 7,
    fontsize_col = 10,
    main = "GSEA Hallmark NES per cNMF Pattern",
    silent = TRUE
  )

  ggsave(
    file.path(output_dir, "cNMF_gsea_hallmark_heatmap.pdf"),
    plot = p_hallmark,
    width = 10,
    height = max(6, nrow(nes_mat) * 0.25)
  )
  cat("\nSaved Hallmark GSEA heatmap.\n")
}

# --- 5b. Top genes dot plot per pattern ---
n_show <- 20
plot_data <- list()
for (pat in colnames(spectra)) {
  scores <- spectra[[pat]]
  names(scores) <- rownames(spectra)
  top_g <- names(sort(scores, decreasing = TRUE))[1:n_show]

  plot_data[[pat]] <- data.frame(
    gene = factor(top_g, levels = rev(top_g)),
    pattern = pat,
    z_score = spectra[top_g, pat],
    tpm = spectra_tpm[top_g, pat],
    stringsAsFactors = FALSE
  )
}
plot_df <- do.call(rbind, plot_data)

p_dotplot <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = pattern, y = gene, color = z_score, size = tpm)) +
  geom_point() +
  scale_color_gradient2(low = "blue", mid = "white", high = "red", midpoint = 0,
                        name = "Z-score") +
  scale_size_continuous(name = "TPM loading", range = c(0.5, 4)) +
  facet_wrap(~pattern, scales = "free_y", nrow = 1) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 9) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x = element_blank(),
    axis.ticks.x = element_blank(),
    strip.text = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank()
  ) +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL, title = "Top 20 genes per cNMF pattern")

ggsave(
  file.path(output_dir, "cNMF_top_genes_dotplot.pdf"),
  plot = p_dotplot,
  width = 3 * selected_k,
  height = 8
)
cat("Saved top genes dot plot.\n")

# -- plot GSEA --

n_top_gsea_per_collection <- 5
for (pat in colnames(spectra)) {
  
  combined_list <- list()
  
  for (collection_name in c("Hallmark", "Reactome", "GO:BP")) {
    
    gsea_df <- switch(collection_name,
      "Hallmark" = gsea_hallmark,
      "Reactome" = gsea_reactome,
      "GO:BP"    = gsea_gobp
    )
    
    if (is.null(gsea_df) || nrow(gsea_df) == 0) next
    
    pat_df <- gsea_df[gsea_df$pattern == pat, ]
    if (nrow(pat_df) == 0) next
    
    prefix_pattern <- switch(collection_name,
      "Hallmark" = "^HALLMARK_",
      "Reactome" = "^REACTOME_",
      "GO:BP"    = "^GOBP_"
    )
    
    pat_df$pathway_clean <- gsub(prefix_pattern, "", pat_df$pathway)
    pat_df$pathway_clean <- gsub("_", " ", pat_df$pathway_clean)
    pat_df$pathway_clean <- tolower(pat_df$pathway_clean)
    pat_df$pathway_clean <- paste0(toupper(substring(pat_df$pathway_clean, 1, 1)),
                                    substring(pat_df$pathway_clean, 2))
    pat_df$pathway_clean <- ifelse(nchar(pat_df$pathway_clean) > 50,
                                    paste0(substr(pat_df$pathway_clean, 1, 47), "..."),
                                    pat_df$pathway_clean)
    
    # Top N by |NES| per collection
    pat_df <- pat_df[order(abs(pat_df$NES), decreasing = TRUE), ]
    pat_df <- head(pat_df, n_top_gsea_per_collection)
    pat_df$collection <- collection_name
    
    combined_list[[collection_name]] <- pat_df
  }
  
  if (length(combined_list) == 0) next
  combined_df <- do.call(rbind, combined_list)
  
  combined_df$neg_log10_padj <- -log10(combined_df$padj)
  
  # Set collection as ordered factor for grouping
  combined_df$collection <- factor(combined_df$collection,
                                    levels = c("Hallmark", "Reactome", "GO:BP"))
  
  # Within each collection, order by NES
  combined_df <- combined_df[order(combined_df$collection, combined_df$NES), ]
  
  # Create unique y labels (in case of duplicate pathway names across collections)
  combined_df$y_label <- make.unique(combined_df$pathway_clean, sep = " ")
  combined_df$y_label <- factor(combined_df$y_label, levels = combined_df$y_label)
  
  # Symmetric NES axis
  max_abs_nes <- max(abs(combined_df$NES)) * 1.05
  
  p <- ggplot(combined_df, aes(x = NES, y = y_label, fill = NES, size = neg_log10_padj)) +
    geom_point(shape = 21, stroke = 0.3) +
    scale_fill_gradient2(low = "#2166AC", mid = "white", high = "#B2182B", midpoint = 0,
                         name = "NES") +
    scale_size_continuous(name = expression(-log[10]~p[adj]), range = c(2, 7)) +
    scale_x_continuous(limits = c(-max_abs_nes, max_abs_nes)) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "grey40", linewidth = 0.3) +
    facet_grid(collection ~ ., scales = "free_y", space = "free_y", switch = "y") +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
      strip.text.y.left = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold", angle = 0),
      strip.placement = "outside",
      plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right"
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Normalized Enrichment Score (NES)",
      y = NULL,
      title = paste0(pat, " \u2014 GSEA")
    )
  
  n_terms <- nrow(combined_df)
  ggsave(
    file.path(output_dir, paste0("cNMF_gsea_combined_", pat, ".pdf")),
    plot = p,
    width = 9,
    height = max(4, n_terms * 0.32 + 2)
  )
}
cat("Saved combined GSEA dot plots per pattern.\n")

# Plot ORA
n_top_ora <- 10

for (pat in names(ora_results)) {
  res <- ora_results[[pat]]
  if (is.null(res) || nrow(res) == 0) next
  
  res$pathway_clean <- gsub("^GOBP_", "", res$pathway)
  res$pathway_clean <- gsub("_", " ", res$pathway_clean)
  res$pathway_clean <- tolower(res$pathway_clean)
  res$pathway_clean <- paste0(toupper(substring(res$pathway_clean, 1, 1)),
                               substring(res$pathway_clean, 2))
  res$pathway_clean <- ifelse(nchar(res$pathway_clean) > 50,
                               paste0(substr(res$pathway_clean, 1, 47), "..."),
                               res$pathway_clean)
  
  res$gene_ratio <- res$overlap / res$query_size
  res$neg_log10_padj <- -log10(res$padj)
  
  # Top N by padj
  res <- head(res[order(res$padj), ], n_top_ora)
  
  # Order by gene ratio for plotting
  res <- res[order(res$gene_ratio), ]
  res$pathway_clean <- factor(res$pathway_clean, levels = res$pathway_clean)
  
  p <- ggplot(res, aes(x = gene_ratio, y = pathway_clean, size = overlap, color = neg_log10_padj)) +
    geom_point() +
    scale_color_viridis_c(option = "inferno", direction = -1, end = 0.85,
                          name = expression(-log[10]~p[adj])) +
    scale_size_continuous(name = "Overlap", range = c(2, 7)) +
    theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
    theme(
      panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
      panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
      axis.text.y = element_text(size = 9),
      plot.title = element_text(size = 11, face = "bold"),
      legend.position = "right"
    ) +
    labs(
      x = "Gene ratio (overlap / query size)",
      y = NULL,
      title = paste0(pat, " \u2014 ORA GO:BP (top ", n_top_genes_ora, " genes)")
    )
  
  ggsave(
    file.path(output_dir, paste0("cNMF_ora_gobp_", pat, ".pdf")),
    plot = p,
    width = 8,
    height = max(3, nrow(res) * 0.35 + 1)
  )
}
cat("Saved ORA GO:BP dot plots per pattern.\n")

# --- 5c. Save results ---
collapse_leading_edge <- function(df) {
  if ("leadingEdge" %in% colnames(df) && is.list(df$leadingEdge)) {
    df$leadingEdge <- vapply(df$leadingEdge, paste, collapse = ";", FUN.VALUE = character(1))
  }
  df
}

write.csv(collapse_leading_edge(gsea_hallmark), file.path(output_dir, "gsea_hallmark_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(collapse_leading_edge(gsea_reactome), file.path(output_dir, "gsea_reactome_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(collapse_leading_edge(gsea_gobp), file.path(output_dir, "gsea_gobp_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

ora_combined <- do.call(rbind, lapply(names(ora_results), function(pat) {
  df <- ora_results[[pat]]
  if (nrow(df) > 0) df$pattern <- pat
  df
}))
if (!is.null(ora_combined) && nrow(ora_combined) > 0) {
  write.csv(ora_combined, file.path(output_dir, "ora_gobp_results.csv"), row.names = FALSE)
}

top50_df <- data.frame(
  lapply(top50_per_pattern, function(x) { length(x) <- n_top_genes_ora; x }),
  check.names = FALSE
)
write.csv(top50_df, file.path(output_dir, "top50_genes_per_pattern.csv"), row.names = FALSE)

cat("\nAll annotation outputs saved to:", output_dir, "\n")
```

SIV+ vs SIV-
```{r}
# =============================================================================
# Pattern Marker Identification
# =============================================================================
find_pattern_markers <- function(spectra_tpm,
                                  spectra_score = NULL,
                                  n_markers = 50,
                                  method = "weighted_zscore",
                                  min_score = 0,
                                  exclude_shared = FALSE,
                                  shared_threshold = 1.5) {

  stopifnot(is.matrix(spectra_tpm) || is.data.frame(spectra_tpm))
  spectra_tpm <- as.matrix(spectra_tpm)
  stopifnot(all(spectra_tpm >= 0))

  patterns <- colnames(spectra_tpm)
  genes <- rownames(spectra_tpm)
  n_patterns <- ncol(spectra_tpm)

  if (is.null(patterns)) patterns <- paste0("pattern_", seq_len(n_patterns))
  if (is.null(genes)) stop("spectra_tpm must have rownames (gene names).")

  # Compute Z-scores per gene if not provided
  if (is.null(spectra_score)) {
    row_means <- rowMeans(spectra_tpm)
    row_sds <- apply(spectra_tpm, 1, sd)
    row_sds[row_sds == 0] <- 1  # avoid division by zero for constant rows
    spectra_score <- (spectra_tpm - row_means) / row_sds
  } else {
    spectra_score <- as.matrix(spectra_score)
    stopifnot(identical(dim(spectra_score), dim(spectra_tpm)))
  }

  # Build per-gene, per-pattern stats (vectorized)
  # For each gene and each pattern, compute the ratio to the best competing pattern
  # and other useful quantities.
  stats_list <- vector("list", n_patterns)

  for (i in seq_len(n_patterns)) {
    tpm_this <- spectra_tpm[, i]
    zscore_this <- spectra_score[, i]

    # Max loading across all OTHER patterns for each gene
    if (n_patterns == 2) {
      max_other <- spectra_tpm[, -i]
    } else {
      max_other <- apply(spectra_tpm[, -i, drop = FALSE], 1, max)
    }

    ratio <- tpm_this / (max_other + 1e-10)

    stats_list[[i]] <- data.frame(
      gene = genes,
      pattern = patterns[i],
      tpm = tpm_this,
      zscore = zscore_this,
      max_other_tpm = max_other,
      ratio = ratio,
      stringsAsFactors = FALSE
    )
  }

  marker_df <- do.call(rbind, stats_list)
  rownames(marker_df) <- NULL

  # Apply minimum score filter
  if (min_score > 0) {
    marker_df <- marker_df[marker_df$tpm >= min_score, ]
  }

  # Apply shared-gene exclusion filter
  if (exclude_shared) {
    marker_df <- marker_df[marker_df$ratio >= shared_threshold, ]
  }

  # Compute the composite marker_score based on method
  marker_df$marker_score <- switch(method,

    "weighted_zscore" = {
      # Z-score captures specificity (how unusually high this gene loads on
      # this pattern relative to its own distribution). Multiplying by
      # log1p(TPM) upweights genes that are also highly expressed.
      # log1p prevents a handful of very-high-TPM housekeeping genes from
      # dominating; the log compression keeps magnitude informative but
      # bounded.
      marker_df$zscore * log1p(marker_df$tpm)
    },

    "softmax_weighted" = {
      # For each gene, compute softmax across patterns on TPM values.
      # softmax(x_i) = exp(x_i) / sum(exp(x_j)) gives a specificity
      # proportion that amplifies differences more than a linear proportion
      # would. Multiply by TPM to weight by magnitude.
      # Vectorized: subtract row max for numerical stability, then compute.
      row_max <- apply(spectra_tpm, 1, max)
      scaled <- spectra_tpm - row_max  # subtract max per row
      exp_scaled <- exp(scaled)
      softmax_mat <- exp_scaled / rowSums(exp_scaled)
      score_mat <- softmax_mat * spectra_tpm
      # Map back to the long-format marker_df
      as.vector(score_mat[cbind(
        match(marker_df$gene, genes),
        match(marker_df$pattern, patterns)
      )])
    },

    "rank_product" = {
      # Non-parametric approach: for each pattern, rank genes by
      # (1) specificity (ratio to max_other) and (2) magnitude (tpm).
      # Combine as reciprocal of the product of ranks. This is robust
      # to skewed distributions and outliers. Genes that rank well on
      # BOTH dimensions get the highest score.
      rp_scores <- numeric(nrow(marker_df))
      for (pat in patterns) {
        idx <- which(marker_df$pattern == pat)
        pat_data <- marker_df[idx, ]
        n_genes_pat <- nrow(pat_data)
        rank_spec <- rank(-pat_data$ratio, ties.method = "average")
        rank_mag <- rank(-pat_data$tpm, ties.method = "average")
        rp_scores[idx] <- 1 / (rank_spec * rank_mag)
      }
      rp_scores
    },

    "ratio" = {
      # Pure specificity baseline: fold-enrichment over best competitor.
      # No magnitude weighting. Useful for comparison but tends to select
      # low-expression genes that happen to be very pattern-specific.
      marker_df$ratio
    },

    stop("Unknown method: ", method,
         ". Choose from: weighted_zscore, softmax_weighted, rank_product, ratio")
  )

  # Select top markers per pattern
  markers <- list()
  for (pat in patterns) {
    pat_df <- marker_df[marker_df$pattern == pat, ]
    pat_df <- pat_df[order(pat_df$marker_score, decreasing = TRUE), ]
    markers[[pat]] <- head(pat_df$gene, n_markers)
  }

  return(list(
    markers = markers,
    marker_stats = marker_df,
    method = method
  ))
}


# Step 1: Pattern markers weighted for druggability
result <- find_pattern_markers(
  spectra_tpm = spectra_tpm,
  spectra_score = spectra,
  n_markers = 100,
  method = "rank_product",
  min_score = 5,             # require meaningful expression
  exclude_shared = TRUE,     # remove multi-pattern genes
  shared_threshold = 2.0     # require 2x enrichment over next-best
)

# Step 2: Filter against a druggability annotation
# (e.g., DGIdb categories, surface proteins, kinases)
# druggable_genes <- read.csv("dgidb_druggable_genome.csv")$gene
# for (pat in names(result$markers)) {
#   targetable <- intersect(result$markers[[pat]], druggable_genes)
#   cat(sprintf("  %s: %d druggable markers out of %d\n",
#               pat, length(targetable), length(result$markers[[pat]])))
# }
#
# Print top 20 markers per pattern:
markers <- result$markers
for (pat in names(markers)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %s: %s\n", pat, paste(head(markers[[pat]], 20), collapse = ", ")))
}


# =============================================================================
# 3. Infected vs Uninfected Comparison
# =============================================================================

compare_pattern_usage <- function(usage, infected_cellids, group_labels = c("infected", "uninfected")) {
  # Get cell IDs
  all_cellids <- rownames(usage)
  uninfected_cellids <- setdiff(all_cellids, infected_cellids)
  
  cat("Cell counts:\n")
  cat("  Infected:", length(intersect(infected_cellids, all_cellids)), "\n")
  cat("  Uninfected:", length(uninfected_cellids), "\n")
  
  # Subset pattern matrices
  infected_patterns <- usage[rownames(usage) %in% infected_cellids, , drop = FALSE]
  uninfected_patterns <- usage[rownames(usage) %in% uninfected_cellids, , drop = FALSE]
  
  # Calculate summary statistics
  infected_means <- colMeans(infected_patterns)
  uninfected_means <- colMeans(uninfected_patterns)
  
  comparison_df <- data.frame(
    pattern = colnames(usage),
    infected_mean = infected_means,
    uninfected_mean = uninfected_means,
    log2_fold_change = log2((infected_means + 1e-10) / (uninfected_means + 1e-10))
  )
  
  cat("\nPattern usage comparison (means):\n")
  print(comparison_df)
  
  # Statistical testing with Wilcoxon rank-sum test
  stat_results <- lapply(colnames(usage), function(pat) {
    test <- wilcox.test(
      infected_patterns[, pat],
      uninfected_patterns[, pat]
    )
    data.frame(
      pattern = pat,
      p_value = test$p.value,
      infected_median = median(infected_patterns[, pat]),
      uninfected_median = median(uninfected_patterns[, pat])
    )
  })
  
  stat_df <- do.call(rbind, stat_results)
  stat_df$p_adj <- p.adjust(stat_df$p_value, method = "BH")
  
  cat("\nStatistical test results:\n")
  print(stat_df)
  
  # Prepare data for plotting
  plot_data <- rbind(
    data.frame(
      cellID = rownames(infected_patterns),
      group = group_labels[1],
      as.data.frame(infected_patterns),
      check.names = FALSE
    ),
    data.frame(
      cellID = rownames(uninfected_patterns),
      group = group_labels[2],
      as.data.frame(uninfected_patterns),
      check.names = FALSE
    )
  )
  
  return(list(
    comparison = comparison_df,
    stats = stat_df,
    plot_data = plot_data,
    infected_patterns = infected_patterns,
    uninfected_patterns = uninfected_patterns
  ))
}


joint_dir <- "/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGS018/joint/dataframes/"
invitro_both <- read.csv(paste0(joint_dir, "Invitro_both.csv"))
invitro_GEXonly <- read.csv(paste0(joint_dir, "Invitro_onlySingleCell.csv"))
invitro_SALVEonly <- read.csv(paste0(joint_dir, "Invitro_onlySALVE.csv"))
invitro_all <- read.csv(paste0(joint_dir, "Invitro_all.csv"))

infected <- rbind(invitro_SALVEonly, invitro_both)
infected_cellids <- infected$cellID
comparison <- compare_pattern_usage(usage, infected_cellids)

# =============================================================================
# 4. Visualization Functions
# =============================================================================

# 4a. Violin plot of pattern weights by group
plot_pattern_violins <- function(comparison_result, output_path = NULL) {
  plot_data <- comparison_result$plot_data
  stat_df <- comparison_result$stats
  
  # Convert to long format
  plot_long <- pivot_longer(
    plot_data,
    cols = -c(cellID, group),
    names_to = "pattern",
    values_to = "weight"
  )
  
  # Calculate max weights for significance bar positioning
  max_weights <- plot_long %>%
    group_by(pattern) %>%
    summarise(ymax = max(weight), .groups = "drop")
  
  # Merge with stats and create significance labels
  sig_data <- merge(stat_df, max_weights, by = "pattern")
  sig_data$y_pos <- sig_data$ymax * 1.05
  sig_data$label <- case_when(
    sig_data$p_adj < 0.001 ~ "***",
    sig_data$p_adj < 0.01 ~ "**",
    sig_data$p_adj < 0.05 ~ "*",
    TRUE ~ "ns"
  )
  
  # Create plot
  p <- ggplot(plot_long, aes(x = pattern, y = weight, fill = group)) +
    geom_violin(position = position_dodge(0.8), scale = "width", trim = TRUE) +
    geom_boxplot(
      position = position_dodge(0.8),
      width = 0.1,
      outlier.shape = NA,
      alpha = 0.7
    ) +
    geom_text(
      data = sig_data,
      aes(x = pattern, y = y_pos, label = label),
      inherit.aes = FALSE,
      size = 4
    ) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("#E41A1C", "#377EB8")) +
    labs(
      x = "Pattern",
      y = "Pattern Weight",
      fill = "Group",
      title = "cNMF Pattern Usage by Infection Status"
    ) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1),
      legend.position = "bottom"
    )
  
  if (!is.null(output_path)) {
    ggsave(output_path, p, width = 10, height = 6)
    cat("Saved:", output_path, "\n")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# 4b. Heatmap of pattern usage
plot_usage_heatmap <- function(usage, metadata = NULL, output_path = NULL) {
  # Normalize usage per cell (row-wise)
  usage_norm <- usage / rowSums(usage)
  
  # Set up annotation if metadata provided
  if (!is.null(metadata)) {
    # Ensure rownames match
    common_cells <- intersect(rownames(usage_norm), rownames(metadata))
    usage_norm <- usage_norm[common_cells, ]
    annotation_row <- metadata[common_cells, , drop = FALSE]
  } else {
    annotation_row <- NA
  }
  
  # Create heatmap
  p <- pheatmap(
    t(usage_norm),
    cluster_rows = TRUE,
    cluster_cols = TRUE,
    show_colnames = FALSE,
    color = viridis(100),
    main = "cNMF Pattern Usage (normalized)",
    annotation_col = if (!is.null(metadata)) annotation_row else NA,
    silent = TRUE
  )
  
  if (!is.null(output_path)) {
    pdf(output_path, width = 12, height = 6)
    print(p)
    dev.off()
    cat("Saved:", output_path, "\n")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# 4c. Top genes heatmap per pattern
plot_marker_heatmap <- function(spectra, markers, n_genes = 20, output_path = NULL) {
  # Get top n genes for each pattern
  all_marker_genes <- unique(unlist(lapply(markers, head, n_genes)))
  
  # Subset spectra to marker genes
  spectra_subset <- spectra[all_marker_genes, ]
  
  # Z-score for visualization
  spectra_scaled <- t(scale(t(spectra_subset)))
  
  # Create annotation for which pattern each gene belongs to
  gene_pattern <- data.frame(
    pattern = sapply(all_marker_genes, function(g) {
      for (pat in names(markers)) {
        if (g %in% head(markers[[pat]], n_genes)) return(pat)
      }
      return(NA)
    }),
    row.names = all_marker_genes
  )
  
  p <- pheatmap(
    spectra_scaled,
    cluster_rows = FALSE,
    cluster_cols = FALSE,
    show_rownames = nrow(spectra_scaled) <= 50,
    color = colorRampPalette(c("blue", "white", "red"))(100),
    main = paste("Top", n_genes, "Marker Genes per Pattern"),
    annotation_row = gene_pattern,
    silent = TRUE
  )
  
  if (!is.null(output_path)) {
    pdf(output_path, width = 8, height = 12)
    print(p)
    dev.off()
    cat("Saved:", output_path, "\n")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# 4d. Log2 fold change bar plot
plot_log2fc <- function(comparison_result, output_path = NULL) {
  comparison_df <- comparison_result$comparison
  stat_df <- comparison_result$stats
  
  # Merge data
  plot_df <- merge(comparison_df, stat_df[, c("pattern", "p_adj")], by = "pattern")
  plot_df$significant <- plot_df$p_adj < 0.05
  
  p <- ggplot(plot_df, aes(x = reorder(pattern, log2_fold_change), y = log2_fold_change, fill = significant)) +
    geom_bar(stat = "identity") +
    geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed") +
    scale_fill_manual(values = c("grey60", "#E41A1C"), labels = c("ns", "p < 0.05")) +
    coord_flip() +
    labs(
      x = "Pattern",
      y = "Log2 Fold Change (infected / uninfected)",
      fill = "Significance",
      title = "Pattern Enrichment in Infected Cells"
    ) +
    theme_classic()
  
  if (!is.null(output_path)) {
    ggsave(output_path, p, width = 8, height = 6)
    cat("Saved:", output_path, "\n")
  }
  
  return(p)
}

# =============================================================================
# 5. Add cNMF Results to Seurat Object
# =============================================================================

add_cnmf_to_seurat <- function(seurat_obj, usage) {
  # Align cell barcodes
  common_cells <- intersect(Cells(seurat_obj), rownames(usage))
  cat("Matching cells:", length(common_cells), "of", ncol(seurat_obj), "\n")
  
  # Add pattern weights to metadata
  for (pat in colnames(usage)) {
    seurat_obj[[pat]] <- NA
    seurat_obj[[pat]][common_cells, ] <- usage[common_cells, pat]
  }
  
  return(seurat_obj)
}

# =============================================================================
# Example Complete Analysis
# =============================================================================
# Uncomment and run with your data:

# # Load Seurat object
invitro <- readRDS("/projects/b1042/GoyalLab/egrody/extractedData/EGS016/singleCell/Seurat/RDS/Invitro.rds")
seurat_obj <- invitro
#
# # Add cNMF patterns to Seurat
seurat_obj <- add_cnmf_to_seurat(seurat_obj, usage)
#
# # Define infected cells
# infected <- rbind(invitro_SALVEonly, invitro_both)
# infected_cellids <- infected$cellID
#
# # Run comparison
# comparison <- compare_pattern_usage(usage, infected_cellids)
#
# # Generate plots
# plot_pattern_violins(comparison, file.path(output_dir, "cnmf_pattern_violins.pdf"))
# plot_log2fc(comparison, file.path(output_dir, "cnmf_log2fc.pdf"))
# plot_marker_heatmap(spectra, markers, n_genes = 20, file.path(output_dir, "cnmf_marker_heatmap.pdf"))
#
# # Feature plots in Seurat
FeaturePlot(seurat_obj, features = paste0("Pattern_", 1:selected_k), ncol = 3)


```
